title: Epic Battle Between Giant Python and Chinese Dragon
description: A highly detailed, ultra-realistic cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a catastrophic battle between a colossal ancient giant python and a wingless Chinese dragon in a modern Chinese megacity, captured in a single, continuous, documentary-style shot.
content: Ultra-realistic cinematic disaster epic, single continuous shot, no cuts, no montage, no multiple-camera language, documentary-style realism, IMAX-scale clarity, natural film grain, high dynamic range, physically accurate daylight, realistic atmospheric perspective, authentic reflections, volumetric dust and smoke, true-to-life city lighting and environmental behavior. A real modern Chinese megacity in daytime: high-rise towers, elevated roads, broad avenues, plaza spaces, parked and moving cars, street signs, glass facades, all with the look of genuine live-action footage. The shot begins with chaos already underway: a colossal ancient giant python, far larger and more terrifying than a realistic anaconda, is violently rampaging through the city. Its thick muscular body whips between streets and buildings with horrifying speed and weight, crushing cars, smashing roadside structures, wrapping around building facades, lunging at fleeing crowds. People run in panic, vehicles collide, glass shards, concrete dust, torn billboards and debris fill the air. Everything feels like a real catastrophic emergency captured in one uninterrupted shot. Then the sky suddenly shifts. Clouds are torn apart at high speed and a gigantic Chinese dragon dives down from the heavens. This is not a cartoon dragon and has no wings. It is a believable colossal Eastern dragon, a mysterious real biological creature of the natural world, long serpentine body, no wings, powerful limbs, realistic muscles, bones, scale overlap, weathered reflective scales, layered shadows, natural skin tension, believable mass and inertia. As it moves, its body undulates through the air with convincing aerodynamic resistance, whiskers and mane trailing in turbulent airflow, subtle cloud vapor and disturbed mist forming around it. The dragon descends like a guardian over the city, precisely targeting the giant python below. In one continuous shot, the two beasts engage in a brutal close-range fight among skyscrapers and over shattered streets. The python coils, strikes, and thrashes between buildings; the Chinese dragon tears away constriction with its claws, coils around the serpent to overpower it, and finally bites hard into the python's upper body and neck. With overwhelming force, the dragon drags the struggling serpent up from the city ruins and lifts it into the sky. In the final moments, the wingless Chinese dragon powers upward by driving its long body through the air, carrying the still-writhing python away into the distant sky. Below, terrified citizens stop running and stare upward in stunned awe. The ruined city remains filled with smoke, debris, and sunlight cutting through haze, creating a final epic image of a divine dragon saving humanity. Keep the entire piece grounded in real-world physics, realistic destruction, believable scale, terrifying weight, restrained camera behavior, immersive live-action disaster authenticity,

title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Cyberpunk Time Travel from Disaster to Ancient Market
description: A highly detailed, multi-act prompt for Seedance 2.0, inspired by Inception, describing a seamless transition (one-shot, hard cut) from a disaster movie setting (cyberpunk heroine in a flooded city) to an ancient Oriental market via a time portal, focusing on extreme cinematic realism, lighting contrast, and complex action sequences. It uses one reference image for the heroine.
content:
第一幕：灾难片写实风格，一镜到底。镜头从暴风雨天气中漂浮的都城上空开始，向下俯冲至一座被淹没的博物馆碎裂的屋顶上，那里站着一名孤独的赛博朋克女侠
图片1
。她看到远处有一束救援信号弹，便开始奔跑。镜头紧随其后，拍摄他穿越坍塌的屋顶、跃过破碎的天窗、从倾斜的玻璃穹顶滑下，并抓住一根悬垂的电缆。下方，黑暗的洪水在满是漂浮汽车和雕像的街道中汹涌。他落在部分被淹没的电车屋顶上，继续前进，并在巨浪从他身后冲过时到达救援信标平台。冷灰蓝色末世色调，超真实的水物理效果，风，飞溅的水花，手持拍摄带来的紧迫感，一镜到底，无剪辑。

第二幕过渡：视频
视频1
延长10秒。主体: 仿生女侠
图片1
——白色正装西服（被海水浸透贴身、下摆撕裂）、银色机械颈甲、银色仿生义臂、黑色马尾发丝湿透散乱、金色齿轮耳环，面部电影级写实，神情从绝望转为决绝再到震撼 场景: 被洪水半淹的救援信标平台，暴风雨肆虐，四周海浪翻涌，漂浮汽车与残骸在平台四周碰撞，天空灰蓝压迫，远处都城建筑在洪水中倾斜沉没 动作序列: 先巨浪从女侠身后轰然拍过平台，海水漫过膝盖，白色西服被海浪冲刷猛烈翻卷，马尾发丝完全湿透贴面；女侠银色机械义臂猛然插入平台中央控制台，精密金属指节扣住红色信号按钮——特写：红色按钮在灰蓝暴雨光线下发出微弱脉冲光——银色义臂猛然按下，按钮触底发出沉重电气咬合声，红色信号灯骤然亮起，将周围海水染成一圈血红涟漪。 然后平台地面开始震动，海水在震动中向四周荡开圆形波纹；平台中央凭空撕裂出一道竖向裂缝，裂缝边缘涌出炽白色与琥珀色交织的能量光晕，光晕迅速扩张成一道高约三米的椭圆形时空门，门框边缘电弧跳窜，门内景象模糊扭曲——隐约可见暖色光影与嘈杂人声从门缝中透出；海浪再度涌来，平台开始向一侧倾斜下沉，女侠被海水推搡踉跄后退数步。 最后女侠稳住身形，抬头直视时空门，眼神从震撼骤然转为决绝；她银色义臂猛然抓住门框边缘电弧跳窜的能量边界，白色西服下摆与马尾发丝在时空门涌出的热浪中从湿透贴身骤然被向后猛烈掀起；她迈出左脚跨入门槛——镜头紧贴其肩侧跟入——跨越瞬间灰蓝暴雨冷光被门内涌出的正午暖金阳光骤然取代，海浪轰鸣声被嘈杂集市叫卖声淹没，镜头穿过门框的瞬间画面从冷灰蓝硬切为暖橙黄，女侠白色西服在正午阳光下重新刺目，马尾发丝从湿透散乱变为被奔跑气流掀起飞扬——无缝衔接提示词2开场。 风格: 灾难片冷灰蓝写实质感无缝硬切至古代东方集市暖橙色调，跨越门槛瞬间完成色温与时代的双重跳跃，手持晃动贯穿全程，超真实水物理与能量特效并存，4K电影级写实 镜头: 从平台正面平视→推近义臂按钮特写→拉回全景捕捉时空门成形→肩侧紧贴跟随女侠跨入门内，相机始终位于女侠右后方约半米处(thats where the camera is) 构图: 时空门居画面中轴线，女侠剪影在冷蓝暴雨背景与门内暖金光晕的强烈冷暖对撞中形成绝对视觉焦点 氛围: 绝境→奇迹→跨越，冷暖光色对撞，末世与古典文明的时空断层感 音频: 暴雨海浪轰鸣+时空门低频共鸣嗡鸣渐强→红色信号灯电气咬合声→时空门电弧跳窜声→跨门瞬间海浪声被集市嘈杂叫卖声硬切取代；无水印、无字幕、无文字叠加
第三幕：{ "shot": { "composition": "快速移动摄影穿越拥挤集市街道", "lens": "电影级手持街头镜头", "camera_movement": "快速推进穿越人群，突然急速横甩镜头转向" }, "subject": { "description": "赛博朋克女侠
图片1
穿越繁忙集市疾速奔逃", "wardrobe": "白色正装西服、机械义臂、金属颈甲、马尾发型、金色耳环，五官写实稳定全程不变形", "props": "水果摊、竹编货篮、织物摊位、悬挂香料串" }, "scene": { "location": "古代东方城市集市街巷", "time_of_day": "正午", "environment": "密集摊位、叫卖商贩、熙攘人群、石板地面" }, "visual_details": { "action": "女侠机械义臂撑地纵身跃过货摊，机械手指擦过竹篮边缘带翻水果堆；落地后白色西服下摆翻飞，马尾发丝随急速转向大幅甩动；金属颈甲与机械手臂关节在正午阳光下反射出刺目白光；镜头急速横甩追踪女侠消失于布帘遮挡的狭窄巷口", "special_effects": "水果四散滚落碎溅、脚步踏起石板尘雾爆发、机械手臂运动时迸出细小蓝白电弧、布帘被气流掀起漫天飞舞", "hair_clothing_motion": "白色西服下摆与马尾发丝随奔跑速度猛烈翻飞，机械脊柱背部装甲随动作开合闪光" }, "cinematography": { "lighting": "正午强烈阳光穿透布棚形成斑驳光影格栅，机械义臂与金属颈甲在光影交错中强烈闪烁", "color_palette": "暖色织物与香料黄橙色调、石墙冷灰、女侠白色西服形成强对比焦点", "tone": "动感十足、险象环生、节奏爆裂" }, "audio": { "music": "快节奏冒险打击乐节拍", "ambient": "人群嘈杂叫卖声与石板脚步声", "sound_effects": "水果碎裂声、织物摩擦声、机械义臂金属碰撞声、电弧迸发短促嗡鸣", "mix_level": "动作音效主导，环境声衬底" }, "dialogue": { "character": "", "line": "", "subtitles": false }, "constraints": "人体结构正常，面部稳定不扭曲，画面不闪烁，女侠服装与机械细节全程严格参照@图1原始样貌，机械义臂长度与金属颈甲形态全程保持一致，时长15秒" }
第四幕：接
视频1
延长15秒，女侠
图片1
冲入一个中国古代街市无人窄巷，正午阳光从巷口斜切而入形成强烈光柱，石板地面被晒得泛白，两侧古旧木质墙壁与红色灯笼静默悬挂。女侠从街市奔入巷中急停转身，白色西服下摆因急停惯性猛然翻飞，银色义臂手掌中生出一把散发幽蓝荧光的细长太刀立于巷道中央，丧尸从巷道两端阴影中涌出将其团团围困，腐烂面孔在正午强光与阴影强对比下格外狰狞，琵琶拨弦声骤然失真，丧尸低吼声由远及近，太刀出鞘幽蓝嗡鸣响起。 女侠在丧尸群中快速穿梭，镜头快速跟拍，银色义臂挥舞幽蓝太刀连续横斩，蓝色刀光在正午阳光与阴影交错的巷道中留下强烈残影，冷蓝刀光与暖金阳光形成刺目冷暖对撞。丧尸被击中时暗红色血液在阳光中飞溅出清晰液态弧线，物理破碎感明显，白色西服被溅上暗红污痕，马尾发丝随急速转向大幅甩动，强力鼓点爆发，太刀划破空气的锐利呼啸声与击中腐肉的沉闷湿润撞击声交替涌入。 女侠借义臂撑地猛然跃起至半空，仰视镜头向上追随，白色西服下摆与马尾发丝在跃起气流中向下猛烈展开，背景是古代巷道两侧灰墙与巷口正午强烈蓝天，金色耳环在腾空瞬间被气流吹至平行于地面。太刀以义臂为轴划出巨大弧形蓝色流光，蓝光在强烈阳光下仍清晰刺目，腾空气流爆发声与女侠短促战斗轻喝声

title: Construction Time-Lapse and Deconstruction Prompt Comparison (Seedance 2.0 vs. Grok)
description: The user compares the performance of Grok and Seedance 2.0 for generating a time-lapse video of a building's construction/deconstruction. The tweet contains two highly detailed prompts: one for construction (used for Seedance 2.0) and one for deconstruction (used for Grok). Only the construction prompt is extracted as it was successfully used with Seedance 2.0, demonstrating a clear video generation instruction.
content:
固定机位广角延时摄影，完整记录一座建筑从空白地基到竣工落成的全过程。镜头始终固定，仅通过时间压缩（10-30倍速快进）呈现建造节奏，可见自然光在画面中循环更替（清晨→正午→黄昏→夜间）。 Phase 0｜空白起点 空旷平整的原始场地，地面可见测量桩和轮廓放线。施工设备尚未进场，背景环境（山/海/城市天际线）清晰可见，是全片唯一不变的稳定元素。静止画面持续3秒。 Phase 1｜场地准备与基础施工 挖掘机、推土机快速进场，围挡搭建，安全标识就位。挖掘机开挖基槽，土方被装载车铲起、转运、堆放至场地一侧。钢筋网在基坑内快速铺设成型，混凝土搅拌车驶入、浇筑、抹平。地基轮廓在画面中逐渐清晰。 Phase 2｜主体结构生长 脚手架从地面快速向上攀升，如骨架生长。混凝土柱和楼板逐层浇筑，每一层完成后建筑整体明显升高——呈现阶梯状上升节奏（非连续飞升）。吊车持续旋转，将钢筋、模板、混凝土构件精准吊至作业层。材料堆放区在建筑旁侧始终可见，材料堆随作业进度此消彼长。 Phase 3｜围护与外墙封闭 楼板结构完成后，外墙材料开始安装： 砖混结构：工人逐层砌砖，墙面快速升高 玻璃幕墙：吊车吊起整块玻璃单元，工人对位固定 木质外墙：工人逐块拼装，木板条按顺序覆盖 石材外立面：切割好的石板被吊装、粘贴、压紧 建筑从透明骨架逐渐被外墙"填满"，轮廓日益清晰。 Phase 4｜屋顶完工 屋面结构在工人配合下完成铺设：防水层展开、隔热层覆盖、面层材料逐块就位（瓦片/金属屋面/平屋顶铺装）。屋顶封闭标志建筑主体形态完成，整体轮廓第一次完整呈现。 Phase 5｜门窗安装与机电管线 门窗框架被精准安装入洞口，玻璃由工人配合吊具缓慢就位。与此同时，线管、水管、风管在墙内外快速穿布，如血管在建筑内部延伸。电气设备、卫浴洁具陆续进场安装，室内空间由空壳快速转变为功能体。 Phase 6｜室内装修与外部收尾 室内地面铺装、墙面涂料、吊顶逐步完成，每个空间依次从毛坯变为精装状态。室外同步推进：外立面收口、外墙涂料滚涂或饰面贴附、窗台压顶，建筑表面质感逐渐细腻。 Phase 7｜景观与场地落成 围挡拆除，施工设备依次驶离。绿化施工车辆进场：种植土摊铺，乔木被吊车吊入种植穴，灌木丛快速覆盖地面，草坪分块铺展。硬质铺装（石材/木板/混凝土）逐块拼接完成。灯具、标识、设施依次安装。 Phase 8｜竣工状态 最后一辆施工车辆驶离，场地恢复整洁。建筑完整矗立：外立面光洁，景观绿意盎然，灯光亮起。静止画面持续5秒。背景环境（山/海/天际线）依然是最初那片，未曾改变。 画面定格——从空地到建筑，见证一座房子的诞生。 技术参数 机位：固定广角，构图覆盖建筑主体+周边材料堆放区+进出车辆通道 风格：建造纪录片，4K超清，工业质感色调→竣工暖色调 时间压缩：10-30倍速，保留机械动作可读性 音频：施工声（机械轰鸣、钢筋碰撞）快进处理→竣工时转为空灵配乐 无水印、无字幕、无文字叠加

精密拆解：[参考图建筑名称]有序解构延时摄影，类型：建筑精密拆解延时摄影 / 固定机位逆向记录，duration: 高速逆向演变序列（完整有序拆解周期），core_principle: 禁止魔法过渡，要用快进展示机械和人工有序拆解、材料堆放、转运清理的真实过程。绝对禁止垮塌、爆破、突然消失等不可控镜头。所有拆解必须是可控的、分步的、有序的工程作业。 demolition_methodology: 工业级精密拆解：人工+机械配合→逐件拆卸→分类堆放→系统转运→场地清空 reference_image_analysis: instruction: 深度分析用户提供的[参考图]，静默记录所有建筑关键细节，作为拆解起始状态的100%精准起点 analysis_checklist: [建筑风格类型（现代/传统/混合/热带/工业等）, 建筑层数与整体尺度（单层/多层/别墅/大宅）, 主体结构形式（木结构/混凝土/钢结构/砖混）, 外立面材质（木材/石材/玻璃/混凝土/金属/涂料）, 可拆解部件清单（屋顶/门窗/外墙板/楼板/柱梁等）, 材料估算（需要堆放多少立方木材/钢材/混凝土块等）, 拆解难度评估（哪些部分需要吊车/哪些可人工拆卸）] initial_state_lock: Phase 0必须100%还原参考图完工状态，作为有序拆解的起点 narrative_timeline: [Phase 0: 完工状态（拆解前准备）, Phase 1: 拆解准备与景观移除, Phase 2: 室内物品拆卸与转运, Phase 3: 第一批材料转运（清空部分堆放区）, Phase 4: 门窗与特殊构件拆除, Phase 5: 外墙材料拆除, Phase 6: 第二批材料大规模转运, Phase 7: 主体结构拆除（自上而下有序解体）, Phase 8: 基础拆除与材料清运] - Each phase contains detailed visual descriptions, motion_style, key_action, material_flow, and importance/emphasis notes. The prompt details the entire process from initial complete building state through systematic deconstruction, material sorting, removal, and final site clearance, with emphasis on controlled demolition methods avoiding magical transitions or collapse scenarios.

title: Dark Fairytale Chase-Battle Cinematic Storyboard
description: An extremely detailed, time-coded cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 outlining a dark fairytale battle between a forest witch and an iron hunter, transitioning through multiple settings and featuring specific camera movements, close-ups, and a powerful finale.
content: A cinematic dark fairytale chase-battle. A forest witch in moss-green robes with glowing antler branches controls roots, spores, and luminous vines. Her enemy is a brutal iron hunter in black armor carrying a giant mechanized crossbow and chainsaw spear. The setting transitions from enchanted forest shrine → collapsing tree bridge → glowing mushroom ravine → ancient root throne. 0–3 seconds: the iron hunter crashes through the forest shrine walls in a shower of splintered wood and sparks, firing a massive bolt at the witch. She dissolves into leaves and reforms behind hanging roots. Close-ups of crossbow gears, glowing spores, bark fragments, and her luminous eyes. 3–7 seconds: the hunter charges through the trees with the chainsaw spear tearing through roots. The witch whips glowing vines around his limbs while giant thorn branches erupt from the ground. The tree bridge collapses beneath them. Close-ups of spinning chain teeth, vine tension, sparks, and snapping wood. 7–10 seconds: both plunge into a ravine filled with giant glowing mushrooms and drifting spores. The witch floats between roots and fungus caps while the hunter falls heavily from ledge to ledge, firing bolts upward. She summons enormous root hands from the ravine walls. Orbit camera, bioluminescent fog, dark fantasy atmosphere. 10–12 seconds: fast tracking shot through the ravine as the hunter breaks free and charges one final time. The witch raises both hands, and hundreds of vines spiral together into a glowing spear of living wood. Close-ups of spores, bark twisting, metal armor cracking, and hunter visor sparks. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow-motion impact at the ancient root throne. The living spear hits the hunter in the chest and roots instantly consume his armor, dragging him into the forest floor as green light erupts outward. Mushrooms release clouds of glowing spores and the entire ravine pulses like a living heartbeat. Beautiful, eerie, powerful finale. Style: dark fairytale fantasy, enchanted forest bioluminescence, strong green-gold glow, brutal iron machinery contrast, cinematic destruction, atmospheric spores, mythic witch energy, rich texture detail.turn this director's storyboard into a super realistic cinematic video, 8K resolution, master-level film work

title: Dark Fantasy Golem and Fairy Cinematic Sequence
description: A complex, multi-shot cinematic sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0, spanning 15 seconds with specific timestamps for scene transitions, detailing the interaction between a stone golem and a luminous fairy by a tranquil lake.
content:
Cinematic sequence, 15 seconds, dark fantasy video game.

[0:00–0:03] Wide shot of the stone golem with his red knitted scarf and glowing orange chest orb walking slowly toward a tranquil lake surrounded by ancient weeping willows, their long branches gently swaying and touching the water's surface, soft golden light filtering through the canopy.

[0:03–0:05] The golem sits down heavily at the edge of the lake, his reflection visible in the still water alongside the glow of his chest orb, a moment of stillness.

[0:05–0:08] Frontal shot facing the golem. Suddenly, the water begins to shimmer and ripple with ethereal light. A fairy emerges from the lake — a delicate, luminous, translucent figure made of soft white and pale blue light, with flowing features that dissolve into particles at the edges, small glowing sparks orbiting around her. She floats gracefully toward the golem, hovering just above the water. She leans close to him and whispers. Faint glowing text appears on screen: "Humanity awaits you. Only you can save them."

[0:08–0:10] Cut to close-up of the golem's face — his black eyes widen, his head tilts back in a clear expression of shock and surprise. The orb in his chest flares brightly, pulsing with intense golden light.

[0:10–0:12] The fairy dissolves into particles that scatter upward into the air and disappear. The golem stares at the empty space for a brief moment.

[0:12–0:15] The golem stands up abruptly, his heavy stone body rising with sudden urgency. He turns and begins running away from the lake with determined thundering steps, his red scarf trailing and bouncing behind him. Cut to black.

Atmospheric lighting with cool blue-greens around the lake transitioning to warm gold when the fairy appears, cinematic depth of field, volumetric light through willow branches.

Sound design only, no music: heavy stone footsteps on soft earth approaching the lake, water lapping gently at the shore, a heavy stone thud when he sits, willow branches rustling, water shimmering and chiming when the fairy emerges, a soft ethereal whisper voice delivering the message, silence on the close-up of the golem's surprised face, a bright resonant pulse from the orb flaring, fairy dissolving with

title: Dystopian Surreal Cinematic Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a dark, surreal, post-war dystopian film with specific camera movements, color grading, and symbolic imagery, such as a fragmented giant face and a woman carrying a house structure.
content:
A dark, cinematic surreal film set in a post-war dystopian city, muted tones, cold color grading, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, dramatic lighting.

Scene 1:
A cracked empty street near a foggy shoreline. A woman in a long grey coat walks slowly toward the camera. Beside her floats a giant fragmented human face made of broken buildings and concrete, subtly shifting as if alive. Dust particles drift in the air.

Scene 2:
Cut to a tired child leaning against a broken wall indoors, eyes half-closed, exhausted. In the blurred background, another child sits silently. The atmosphere feels heavy, abandoned, and hopeless.

Scene 3:
A stern middle-aged man in a grey overcoat stands in a ruined European-style street beside an old rusty car. The camera slowly pushes in as he looks ahead with a hardened expression.

Scene 4:
Close-up of a woman’s face partially merged with mechanical and architectural fragments. Orange butterflies flutter around her head in slow motion, symbolizing fragile hope.

Scene 5:
A crowded street under a massive curved wall embedded with small structures and windows. People walk aimlessly, heads down, creating a sense of routine and oppression.

Scene 6:
A street musician with messy hair plays a guitar into a vintage microphone. Behind him stands a silent crowd. A rusted tram looms in the background. Light rain begins to fall.

Scene 7:
A line of children in worn vintage clothing stands still, staring directly into the camera. Their expressions are blank, almost haunting. Slow dolly movement forward.

Scene 8:
A surreal couple walks together. The woman carries a house-like structure on her head, with her face visible through a small window. The man beside her is partially covered in dark soot. They walk through rubble in silence.

Scene 9 (Final):
A woman sits in a cluttered room filled with old radios and clocks. A sign reading “MORE” hangs behind her. She slowly turns a knob on a vintage radio as static fills the air. Fade to black.
🎥 Style & Motion Keywords

cinematic, dystopian, surreal realism, slow motion, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 35mm film look, desaturated tones, symbolic storytelling, melancholic mood, smooth camera movement

title: Cinematic Post-Apocalyptic Survival Sequence
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for Seedance 2.0, structuring a cinematic sequence about a woman aiming a bow in a gritty post-apocalyptic setting. The prompt specifies cinematic setup, film stock, lighting, character description, audio style, and a second-by-second timeline detailing shot types (ECU, Macro Cut, OTS, POV, Wide Shot) and actions.
content: "[CINEMATIC SETUP] Genre & Mood: Gritty Post-Apocalyptic Survival. Tense, visceral, and hyper-realistic. Film Stock & Lens: Shot on 35mm anamorphic lens, f/2.8 for shallow depth of field. Teal-orange desaturated color grade with earthy, dusty undertones. Lighting & Atmosphere: Dramatic volumetric Golden Hour light with heavy dust motes and heat haze. Character Description: An athletic woman in her late 20s, wearing weathered tactical leather armor and dirt-smudged skin. Her hair is wind-blown and messy; her expression is one of intense, lethal focus. Audio Style: Immersive spatial sound design. Detailed SFX of bowstring tension, rhythmic heavy breathing, wind howling through the canyon, and a high-velocity "thwack" on impact. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-3s: [Extreme Close-up (ECU)] High-angle shot of the woman's face as she aims a mechanical compound bow. The bowstring is pulled taut against her cheek. Movie-level realistic facial features, no deformation, stable throughout. 3-4s: [Macro Cut] Extreme close-up of her iris. The pupil dilates sharply as she locks onto her target. Realistic light reflections in the eye. 4-8s: [Over-the-shoulder (OTS) Shot] The camera sits behind her shoulder on a jagged cliff edge. In the valley below, a herd of mutated, post-apocalyptic Cape Buffalo with thickened grey hide and jagged horns graze peacefully. Smooth camera push-in. 8-10s: [The Release & POV] She releases the arrow. Fast Tracking POV shot following the arrowhead at maximum velocity. Intense motion blur on the passing rocky environment as the arrow slices the air. 10-15s: [Impact & Wide Shot] The arrow strikes the lead beast in the flank with realistic physics. The animal collapses heavily into the dust. The rest of the herd panics and scatters in a chaotic wide shot. Sound fade to the howl of the wind. [STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic 8K, ultra-detailed textures (skin pores, rusted metal, animal fur), cinematic lighting, perfect motion blur, high dynamic range, no artifacts, coherent multi-subject motion."

title: Detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for a skeleton girl playing piano in a miniature diorama
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot Seedance 2.0 prompt adapted from another creator's work, focusing on generating a whimsical, clay-animation style video. It specifies the subject (a stylish skeleton girl), the environment (a miniature diorama with glowing ghosts), the mood, and a precise three-shot timeline with specific camera movements, actions, and audio cues.
content:
Subject:
Subject 1: A cute and stylish skeleton girl. She wears a navy sailor-style jacket, a pink pleated skirt, and a wide-brimmed hat adorned with a small skull. Her skeleton fingers are highly flexible, delicate, and expressive. For consistency in appearance and character, please refer to reference image.
Environment:
A high-quality 3D miniature diorama with a whimsical, clay-animation style. A small white grand piano sits on a stage with a stone-like texture. Surrounding her are several friendly, glowing white ghosts with simple black eyes, shaped like draped fabric. A dreamlike blue architectural space. Warm, fantastical light emanates from the ghosts and small lanterns. Toy-like texture.
Mood:
Eccentric, elegant, and cozy, yet somewhat eerie. The performance is not chaotic but deliberate, creating a magical and graceful impression.
Timeline:
[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: Wide-angle POV, slow push-in. A skeletal girl sits elegantly at the white grand piano on the stone stage. She raises her skeletal hands, slightly tucks her posture, and after snapping her head up to look straight ahead, begins to play the keys smoothly. Audio: A beautiful, elegant classical piano intro.
[00:02-00:03] Shot 2: Hard cut to a medium shot. Stable movement via gimbal. She is in complete control of the melody. Her skeletal fingers press the keys with clear, legible movements in a flowing cycle, gliding smoothly across the surface. Friendly, glowing white ghosts sway and bounce gently in time with the music’s rhythm. Audio: A fast-paced, rhythmic classical piano melody syncs perfectly with her finger movements.
[00:03-00:07] Shot 3: Close-up, tracking slightly. Focus on her face and the piano keys. She concludes her performance with a dramatic finale and removes her hands from the keys as the ghosts begin to glow more brightly in the warm lighting. She turns toward the camera and nods gently. Audio: The final, elegant piano chord resonates, followed by a soft, magical chorus.

title: Transforming School Bus Mecha
description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a high-energy sci-fi action scene where a matte-black vintage school bus transforms into a towering industrial T-Rex mecha on a rain-drenched road in a fog-covered pine forest. The prompt specifies cinematography details (low-angle tracking shot, IMAX, anamorphic lenses), transformation mechanics, lighting (cold blue tones contrasted with fiery orange), and a blockbuster tone.
content: [Cinematography]: A dynamic low-angle tracking shot glides alongside a sleek black bus, rain streaking across the lens. The camera shifts into a slightly shaky, handheld style as tension builds, emphasizing the scale and intensity of the transformation. Shot on IMAX digital cameras with anamorphic lenses, high shutter speed capturing fine mechanical details, with water droplets clinging to the lens and a shallow depth of field isolating the transforming structure. [Subject]: A matte-black vintage school bus with subtle wear and darkened metal edges, driven by a focused young woman behind the wheel. As the transformation begins, the bus morphs into a towering, industrial T-Rex mecha—formed from interlocking blackened steel, rotating bus tires becoming powerful limb joints, and the front grille tearing open into a sharp, mechanical jaw. [Action]: The girl speeds down the rain-soaked road, gripping the wheel with determination as water sprays from the tires. Suddenly, hydraulic systems activate—the roof splits apart, wheels twist inward into legs, and the chassis rises vertically. The mecha slams onto the ground, cracking the wet asphalt. Its glowing red eyes ignite from the headlights, and it releases a blazing stream of fire into the stormy air. [Context]: A winding, rain-drenched road cutting through a dense, fog-covered pine forest. Towering trees loom on both sides, partially hidden by thick mist. Rain pours heavily, creating reflections on the slick asphalt that mirror the transformation. [Style & Ambiance]: A high-energy sci-fi action tone inspired by blockbuster transformation films. Realistic, gritty CGI textures with dark metallic finishes and subtle rust. The scene is lit with cold blue tones from the stormy twilight, sharply contrasted by the fiery orange glow of the mecha’s breath and piercing red eyes, enhancing the dramatic intensity.

title: Detailed Gacha Game Summon Animation
description: An extensive master prompt for creating professional gacha game 'summon' or 'gacha' animations with complex transitions, UI overlays, and rarity reveals.
content:
参考画像はリファレンスとしてのみ使用し、スタートフレームには使用しない。 ソシャゲのガチャ演出風。アップテンポで高揚感のあるBGM、電子音・抽選音・確定演出音などの効果音あり。
おしゃぶりをした少女は喋らず、口元は一切動かさない。 全てのトランジションは衝撃・閃光・UI発光を伴うド派手な演出。
開始直後、以下の演出に入る。 超高速トランジション。
空間が歪み、ガラスのように砕け、破片が光へ変換され吸い込まれていく。
強いホワイトアウト。 その直後カット。 暗い空間に、
参考画像から連想される特徴を極端に誇張した「異常に奇抜なガチャ装置」がすでに存在している状態で描写される。 （例：キャラの髪色・モチーフ・世界観がそのまま機械化されている）
・巨大すぎる構造
・非現実的な回転機構
・浮遊パーツ
・光る配管やエネルギー流路
・意味不明だがかっこいい動き 装置内部にはエネルギーが循環し、脈動している。 画面中央に「TAP」「PULL」「OPEN」などの操作UIが表示される。
UIはネオン調で強く発光し、軽く振動. 操作と同時に、
装置が暴走するように振動・回転・発光。
エネルギーが臨界に達し、一点に収束。 カット変更。 排出演出：
参考画像の特徴から連想される「入れ物」が装置からぽろっと排出される。 （例）
・カプセル
・卵
・結晶
・箱
・缶
・巻物
・食べ物風オブジェ 形状・質感・色は参照画像から決定される。 入れ物は一度バウンドし、床や空間に軽く衝突して転がる。
その瞬間、ひび割れ・発光・内部からエネルギーが漏れ出す。 レアリティ判定演出：
・高レア：虹色・プリズム・画面全体に光が拡散 入れ物が震えながら、
徐々に浮き上がる。 カット変更。 入れ物が爆発的に開く。
内部から光と粒子が噴き出し、
参考画像の特徴を誇張したシルエットが出現。 強いフラッシュ。 カット変更。 参考画像の背景の雰囲気を継承した空間がすでに存在している状態で描写される（切り替えではなく、最初からそこにあるように見える）。
差し込む光、霧、粒子、空気の流れ。 キャラクターが中央に出現。 カメラ演出：
・足元から急速パン→顔へ
・周囲を回転しながら寄る
・キャラクターは躍動感にあふれる動き
・スローモーション→加速 キャラクターの周囲に、
参考画像から連想される属性エフェクトが発生。 （例）
・炎、水、雷、氷、光、闇、機械、自然など
・色や形状は参照画像の印象から決定 さらに、
属性マーク（エンブレム）がキャラクター背後または上空に出現し、
発光・回転・分裂する。 同時に、
画面全体にパーティクルが大量発生し、
レンズフレア、衝撃波、光の筋が走る. 画面中央に巨大テキスト： 「SSR」「UR」「LEGEND」などのレアリティ表示
（参考画像の印象から自動決定） 続いて、
参考画像の見た目から連想される
“異常に誇張された二つ名”を生成して表示。 さらにキャラクター名も生成表示。 追加UI演出： ・画面下部に豪華なキャラカードUIが出現
・枠は金・虹などに強く発光
・星の数が1つずつポップアップ
・カードが回転・スライド・発光 ステータス表示：
・HP / ATK / DEF / SPEED などが高速でカウントアップ
・数値は参照画像の印象から自動生成 スキル表示：
・スキル名を生成して表示
（例：「次元崩壊ブレイク」「無限反射オーラ」など）
・スキル発動のミニ演出（短いエフェクト） レア時追加演出：
・背景が一瞬変異（宇宙・崩壊・神殿など）
・画面揺れ + 強いフラッシュ
・粒子量増加 最終カット： キャラクターがカッコいい決めポーズで静止。
・キャラクターから連想される「称号」とカッコいい「名前」を画面にカッコいいハイセンスなデザインロゴで表示する。
背後に属性エンブレム、周囲にエネルギーが循環し続ける。
UIが軽く発光し続け、ループ可能な状態で終了。 スタイル：
cinematic, gacha game UI overlay, ultra detailed, high contrast, fantasy summon machine, dynamic lighting, volumetric light, glow, particles, motion blur, lens flare, impact flashes

title: Surreal Dream Collapse Sequence
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a surreal, cinematic sequence involving red-cloaked figures, giant stone faces, a glowing tree, and a transition to a sci-fi dream research facility, emphasizing narrative and visual complexity.
content: Shot 1 : Low wide tracking shot from behind the red-cloaked group as they walk slowly toward the glowing tree across the white valley floor. The giant face on the right subtly begins turning toward the left, stone creaking, dust shedding from its surface Shot 2 : Medium close shot on two walkers stopping abruptly, both turning toward each other in shock, pale reflected light on their faces, distant rumble echoing. One whispers, “Did it move?” Shot 3 : Hard cut to a breathtaking aerial crane-up, rising high above the valley into a godlike overhead view. As the camera ascends, the left giant finally answers in a deep ancient voice that rolls across the landscape: “Dreamers… you have returned.” Shot 4 : Elegant descending orbit around the central tree. The white horse walks slowly toward the trunk with unnatural calm. As the horse touches the tree, its body dissolves into pale particles and flowing light, vanishing into the bark as if absorbed into memory. The ground ripples outward in soft concentric distortions. Shot 5 : The world begins collapsing into surreal instability. The red-cloaked figures brace themselves as reality peels open around them. Camera whips upward and backward in a dizzying dream-collapse, beautiful not horrific. Shot 6 : Cut to a sleek sci-fi dream research facility. A small group of people sleep in a circular chamber, connected to futuristic interfaces, sharing dream projections of the exact surreal valley. One wall-sized hologram shows the tree and giant faces. The atmosphere is hushed, awestruck, luminous blue-white. Final camera push inward as the group watches the shared dream together, revealing that the entire vision is a collective dream space.

title: Hyper-realistic Cyberpunk POV Action Sequence
description: A detailed, ultra-cinematic prompt for generating a hyper-realistic, first-person POV action sequence set in a dense cyberpunk megacity at night, focusing on dynamic camera work, motion blur, and intense movement.
content:
Hyper-realistic first-person POV inside a dense cyberpunk megacity at night, the camera represents the character’s eyes, both hands frequently entering frame with subtle finger motion, slight tremble from adrenaline.

Action sequence: the POV character sprints through a narrow neon-lit alley, heavy breathing driving camera rhythm, rapid head turns scanning surroundings. Flickering holographic signs and glowing advertisements streak past, creating intense motion blur and color trails.

Distant mechanical drones descend into view, scanning aggressively. The POV character reacts instantly, turning sharply and accelerating, feet pounding against wet pavement with visible splashes and reflections.

The character vaults over obstacles, one hand slamming onto surfaces for support, then slides under a low barrier, camera dipping close to the ground before rising back up into a sprint. Hands remain visible, grounding every movement.

Camera behavior: aggressive handheld POV, constant micro jitter, body sway, fast whip pans during direction changes, forward push-in momentum, head bob synced with running cadence, dynamic focus shifts (f/0.4).

Environment: dense cyberpunk city with layered neon signage, holograms, steam vents, reflective rain-soaked streets, volumetric fog catching colored light, deep depth from foreground hands to distant skyline.

Lighting: high-contrast neon (cyan, magenta, electric blue), reflections on wet surfaces, glowing atmosphere, strong backlight silhouettes.

Style: ultra-cinematic realism, Blade Runner-inspired tone, documentary action intensity, motion blur streaks, no HUD, no overlays, no text, stable anatomy, normal proportions without stretch.

title: Epic Space Combat Scene with Cosmic Energy and Zero-Gravity Camera
description: A detailed prompt for generating an epic space combat video between a woman in a flowing combat coat and an alien warrior in crystalline armor. The scene is set in an asteroid field above a nebula, featuring continuous action, rapid teleportation, gravity-defying strikes, and massive gravity pulses. The prompt specifies cinematic rendering, hyper-realistic space lighting, and dynamic camera work with velocity ramps.
content:
A woman in her late 20s wearing a flowing black combat coat threaded with glowing silver star patterns leaps across fragments of shattered asteroids drifting in deep space.

Facing her is a tall alien warrior clad in crystalline armor emitting pulsating violet energy from within its translucent body.

She attacks in a continuous chain — rapid teleport dashes, spinning blade arcs, and gravity-defying aerial strikes that send waves of cosmic energy rippling through the asteroid field.

The alien warrior counters with massive gravity pulses that shatter nearby asteroids and fling debris outward like meteor storms.

Camera orbits the duel in sweeping zero-gravity arcs, drifting through the debris field while alternating between intense close-up blade clashes and wide celestial views of the asteroid battlefield.

Velocity ramps drive the spectacle — attacks accelerate into blinding flashes while key impacts freeze momentarily, showing fragments of rock and energy suspended in the void before motion resumes.

Environment: a drifting asteroid field above a glowing nebula, distant planets visible through clouds of cosmic dust.

Soft nebula light in blues and purples illuminates the scene while bright energy bursts from the combatants create dramatic diegetic flashes across floating debris.

Hyper-realistic space lighting, cinematic rendering, volumetric nebula clouds, cinematic grain, 8K resolution.

title: Dragon Flight Over Siege City
description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 (Dreamina) to generate a 15-second first-person perspective video of a colossal dragon flying through a massive medieval-fantasy city under siege at dusk, including specific action choreography, camera movements, and photorealistic style constraints.
content:
**Environment:**

A massive medieval-fantasy city under siege at dusk. Stone towers, cathedral spires, and narrow streets stretch toward the horizon while fire spreads through rooftops and smoke rises into the orange evening sky. Wind currents swirl between the tall buildings.

**Action:**

15.0s sequence from the first-person perspective of a colossal dragon in flight. The viewer sees the edges of scaled wings occasionally entering frame as the dragon glides between towers. Heat shimmer ripples from its throat with every breath.

At the 2-second mark the dragon dives sharply between two cathedral spires.

Stone gargoyles and stained-glass windows rush past at extreme speed.

The dragon unleashes a stream of fire across a city wall below, igniting entire streets.

Velocity Ramp choreography: the moment the dragon pulls up from the dive slows dramatically — embers, sparks, and falling debris suspended in mid-air — before snapping back as the dragon bursts through a collapsing tower.

**Camera:**

Fast aerial predator POV weaving through the skyline, banking sharply between towers and rooftops.

**Style & Constraints:**

Photorealistic fire simulation, volumetric smoke, cinematic sunset lighting, realistic wing turbulence and debris physics, 8K resolution.

title: Toku-Style Sci-Fi Action Transformation Sequence
description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0, focusing on a fluid, high-fidelity Toku-style (Japanese special effects) transformation sequence where an Asian woman seamlessly converts into a full-body power armor in a gritty urban battlefield, followed by a dynamic battle with a Kaiju-like monster.
content:
Seedance 2.0 视频生成提示词

本视频是一个流畅的、高精细度的、特摄风格（Toku-style）科幻动作场景，核心在于将@图片天衣无缝地转化为全身动力装甲，并伴随流畅的能量特效和场景交互。

[场景描述 - Gritty Urban Battlefield]

环境: 一个阴沉、多云天气下的废弃混凝土室外体育场。地面充满裂纹、碎石和老旧的白色标线。背景是破旧的、生锈的球门门框和高耸的铁丝网围栏。远处有几棵稀疏的树木和公用设施塔架。

氛围: 紧张、荒凉、科幻与现实碰撞。
初始角色: 年轻亚洲女性（根据输入图片），长发，身穿米色卫衣和白色短裙。背景中有几名年轻男性正在打篮球或闲逛。
[动作编排 - Transformation Sequence]

冲突升级 (Conflict Escalation):
在远处，从地面裂缝中，一个巨大的、黑色金属和岩石质感的怪兽（类似 Kaiju，有尖刺，双眼放紫光）轰然站起，掀起巨大尘土。
群众恐慌四散。

核心变身流程 (Fluid Transformation - 关键流畅性描述):
女性察觉怪物，看向怪物，右手举起，露出手腕上的微型紫色发光装置。
（流体转换开始）： 紫色和粉色能量涟漪从装置开始，像液体金属和能量流一样在她的身体上生长和流动。
米色卫衣和短裙流畅地、有机地被一套复杂的、黑色和暗金色相间的全身动力装甲所覆盖和吸收。装甲块从四肢、躯干、腿部生长并锁定。
一个带有紫色核心的复杂腰带锁在她的腰间。装甲表面有精细的纹理和发光的紫色/粉色能量导管。
特效 (VFX): 飞刃（晶体状，紫色发光）在变身完成的同时从她身边Levitate（漂浮）并围绕她流畅地运行。
[战斗与决战 - Action & Decisive Battle]
战斗动作:
怪物咆哮并向她冲来。
装甲女性抬起手臂，紫色能量飞刃从身边弹射，组成流畅的飞舞编队攻向怪物。
她同时释放一道强大的、脉冲式的紫罗兰色能量波。

击中效果:
飞刃和能量波流畅地击中怪物，产生大规模的、炫目的紫色爆炸效果和大量尘土。
怪物受击倒退，地面裂纹加深。
[结局与余波 - Resolution & Aftermath]
结局: 怪物被击败，消失或爆炸（产生最终尘土）。
最后镜头: 装甲女性站在体育场中心，尘土慢慢落下。飞刃返回其轨道。她流畅地回头看了一眼（类似输入图片），然后转过身，向废弃的球门方向走去，她的装甲在阴郁的光线下闪烁，留下深重的脚印。
[导演总结 - Technical Details]
摄影机: 动态特写和中景。变身时使用平滑的跟踪镜头捕捉流畅感，战斗时使用动感和快速的镜头（Shaky cam/snap zoom）。

色彩: 阴郁的灰色场景，对比鲜明、脉冲式的紫色和粉色能量色彩。

纹理: 高精细度的装甲纹理、岩石质感的怪物、 gritty 的混凝土地面。
关键流畅性指令: 变身必须是一次流畅的、不间断的流动，而不是片段拼接。能量特效（变身、飞刃、攻击）必须流畅、有逻辑地流动和变色。

title: Short Drama: 'The Dragon Turns Over: Ex Can't Reach'
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene video prompt for a Seedance 2.0 short drama titled 'The Dragon Turns Over: Ex Can't Reach.' The prompt outlines a 45-second narrative involving workplace humiliation, identity reversal, and a dramatic firing sequence. It specifies camera angles (shaky subjective POV, slow motion, quick cuts), dialogue, micro-expressions, and sound effects across three acts (Betrayal, Return, Firing) to achieve a dramatic, high-stakes reversal.
content:
《潜龙翻身：前任高攀不起》总时长： 45秒核心梗： 职场羞辱 + 身份反转 + 全员震惊 + 肃清门户 

第一幕：穷途末路 (The Betrayal)
时间： [00:00 - 00:15]场景： 拥挤沉闷的开放式办公区。
[00:00-00:05] 运镜：
（保持不变）主观视角手持摇晃。纸箱猛地被推到胸口。
[00:05-00:10] 动作与特写：前女友（苏倩）挽着新任经理（王经理）。她嫌弃地拍手，仿佛沾了灰。
[00:10-00:15] 对白与微表情：苏倩（刻薄）： “李泽，认命吧。王经理年薪五十万，而你？在这个工位坐到死也买不起我那个包。大家同事一场，自己滚吧。”微表情： 王经理油腻地推搡李泽肩膀。李泽低头，拳头死死攥紧，青筋暴起。

第二幕：王者归来 (The Return)
时间： [00:15 - 00:30]场景： 公司大会议室，全体员工列队，等待新老板。
[00:15-00:20] 运镜：
会议室大门被保镖猛地撞开。镜头给到李泽穿着高定西装、气场全开走进来的慢动作（Slow Motion）。
[00:20-00:25] 关键修改：群像反应 (Crowd Reaction)
镜头快速扫过会议桌两侧的普通员工：
有人正准备鼓掌欢迎，看到是李泽后，手僵在半空，嘴巴张大成“O”型。
曾经嘲笑过李泽的两个男同事，惊恐地对视一眼，迅速低下头假装看文件，瑟瑟发抖。
窃窃私语声瞬间消失，全场死寂，只有李泽皮鞋踩在地板上的声音。
[00:25-00:30] 动作与特写：苏倩原本在整理头发准备献媚，看到李泽瞬间，瞳孔剧烈收缩，下意识后退一步撞到椅子。
李泽无视所有人的目光，径直走到主位，拉开椅子，从容坐下。李泽（冷漠，环视全场）： “怎么，不认识我了？原管理层全员解聘。这家公司现在的姓——李。”

第三幕：清算时刻 (The Firing)
时间： [00:30 - 00:45]场景： 局势逆转，彻底清算。
[00:30-00:35] 动作与王经理反应：苏倩慌乱中扑向会议桌试图解释。关键修改：王经理反应
镜头给到王经理，他原本趾高气昂地站在副手位置，此刻双腿一软，直接瘫坐在地上。他颤抖着手想去拿桌上的水杯掩饰尴尬，结果手抖得太厉害，水杯“啪”地打翻，水洒了一裤裆，狼狈不堪。
[00:35-00:40] 对白与高潮：苏倩（带哭腔）： “阿泽！你听我解释，我那是为了刺激你上进！我心里只有你啊！”
李泽甚至没有正眼看她，只是嫌恶地用两根手指夹起桌上的《辞退通知书》，轻轻一扬。
[00:40-00:45] 结局与台词：
纸张像雪花一样散落在苏倩和瘫软的王经理身上。李泽站起身，整理了一下袖口，眼神冰冷如铁。李泽（一字一顿）：
“我买下这家公司，是为了大扫除。我的地盘，容不下垃圾。”
动作：
李泽说完，看都不看地上一眼，转身大步离去。画面处理：
镜头聚焦在李泽决绝的背影上，背景音效只有沉重的关门声——“嘭！”（全黑屏，无字幕，留白结束）

description: A highly detailed, multi-scene Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a 15-second video in a Surreal Art Sci-Fi style. The core aesthetic is 'Porcelain-punk' and Eastern Zen, featuring two robotic entities ('Porcelain Geisha Android' and 'Obsidian Samurai Android') engaging in a martial arts dance on a 'Mirror Lake' under a giant moon, with specific camera angles, visual effects (glowing crystal particles, holographic cherry blossoms), and a dramatic freeze-frame ending.
content: 超现实艺术科幻(Surreal Art Sci-Fi)。8K超清，梦幻柔光渲染。 核心美学：陶瓷朋克(Porcelain-punk)与东方禅意。强调“优雅(Elegance)”与“易碎感(Fragility)”。 材质设定：洁白的高级陶瓷皮肤、金缮工艺(Kintsugi)裂纹修复细节、半透明的液态光翼。 动作设计：像舞蹈一样的武术(Martial Arts Dance)。流体太极与丝绸舞的结合。 光影：纯净的月光蓝与辉煌的金。 【场景】 无尽的“天空之镜”盐湖(Mirror Lake)。巨大的满月悬挂在地平线。水面平静如镜，倒映着两台神性机体。 【角色（绝美机体设计）】 1. “白瓷”机体：一台有着女性柔美轮廓的**陶瓷艺伎机器人(Porcelain Geisha Android)**。全身是无瑕的白瓷，关节处镶嵌着精密的玫瑰金齿轮。身后漂浮着两条**发光的“全息丝绸”飘带(Holographic Silk Ribbons)**。 2. “黑玉”机体：一台修长的**黑曜石武士机器人(Obsidian Samurai Android)**。全身是半透明的黑色玻璃材质，体内流淌着金色的能量液。 【分镜脚本】 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：袖舞·流云 机位：极低角度贴水面滑行(Low-angle Gliding over Water)。 动作：“白瓷”机体旋转起舞，身后的全息飘带化作锋利的武器甩出。 美学奇观：飘带划过水面，没有激起水花，而是激起了**发光的水晶粒子(Glowing Crystal Particles)**。动作轻盈得仿佛没有重量。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：玉碎·交锋 机位：慢动作旋转特写(Slow-mo Orbit Close-up)。 动作：“黑玉”机体拔出一把**液态光剑**，精准地斩向飘带。 碰撞细节：光剑与飘带接触的瞬间，爆开的不是火花，而是无数**粉色的樱花全息碎片(Holographic Cherry Blossoms)**。两台机体在漫天花雨中交错而过，陶瓷与玻璃的碰撞发出风铃般清脆的声音。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：金缮·定格 机位：正俯瞰上帝视角(Top-down God View)。 动作：两台机体同时在水面上画出一个完美的太极圆。 结局：在这个圆的中心，两股能量对撞。画面中心爆发出一道**纯白色的冲击波(Pure White Shockwave)**，瞬间吹散了湖面的涟漪，让画面变成绝对的静止。 收尾定格：两台极美的机器人在月下静止对立，宛如一幅永恒的画卷。

title: Street Fighter-Inspired Car Destruction Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed, multi-segment prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second action video. The video features an Asian warrior in mechanical armor destroying a car in an underground parking lot, using specific camera movements (low-angle push-in, rapid panning, 360-degree slow-motion), extreme physical simulation, and cinematic dark/cold color grading.
content:
[0-4s 爆发起手] 昏暗废弃地下停车场，冷白长管顶灯的顶光勾勒出那位留着高顶髻、两侧剃短发的亚洲武士
图片1
的身影，他身穿破损白色长袍，外覆精致银色龙纹机械肩甲、颈甲和机械臂铠，手持镜头从低角度向前推进，原本蹲伏在破旧轿车车顶的武士猛然绷紧全身，白色长袍下的肌肉紧绷，双脚（战靴）狠狠踏碎轿车引擎盖 [金属引擎盖瞬间凹陷撕裂，钣金碎片向四周飞溅，刺耳的金属扭曲声炸裂]，他猛地抬起头，眼神锐利凶狠，顶髻在动作中晃动，整个上半身向前俯冲，银色肩甲在冷光下闪烁，镜头快速跟拍，瞬间拉升战斗张力； [4-8s 节奏博弈] 武士覆盖银色机械臂铠的粗壮手臂狠狠砸向轿车车身，连续的重击带着毁灭性的蛮力，镜头快速摇移跟拍每一次重击，第一拳砸烂车前挡风玻璃 [钢化玻璃瞬间呈蛛网状炸裂，无数玻璃碎屑喷涌而出，车内座椅被拳风掀飞]，第二记肘击狠狠撞向车身侧面 [车门钣金直接被砸穿，车轴断裂，轮胎瞬间爆胎瘪陷，车身向一侧剧烈倾斜]，武士借力翻身，强壮的双腿蹬踏车身，镜头环绕跟拍其回旋动作，全程保持动作的连贯性，无画面断裂，每一次攻击都伴随精准的物理反馈，手持镜头的轻微晃动模拟真实战斗的震撼感，灰尘在顶光中弥漫飞舞，白色长袍剧烈飘动，银色盔甲反光强烈； [8-12s 巅峰对垒] 镜头切换为 360 度环绕运镜，同时开启升格慢动作，展现武士的巅峰力量爆发，武士汇聚全身力量，双拳并拢狠狠向下砸向已经严重变形的轿车，全身肌肉线条在慢动作中极致绷紧，青筋暴起，银色机械肩甲和臂铠在冷光中泛着寒芒，面容坚毅短须，顶髻武士表情极度凶狠，拳锋与车身接触的瞬间，极致的破坏力爆发 [整个轿车车身被彻底砸扁，金属框架完全弯折断裂，油箱破裂，汽油混合着机油喷涌而出，地面碎石与金属碎片被冲击波掀飞至半空，灰尘形成环形气浪向四周扩散]，慢动作极致展现力量爆发的每一个细节，布料与金属物理模拟极致； [12-15s 终极定格] 升格结束，镜头快速甩镜拉回低角度仰拍，武士从砸扁的轿车上猛然站直身躯，双脚踏在彻底报废的车身上，仰天发出震慑的怒吼，全身肌肉紧绷，破损的白色长袍在冲击波的余风中猎猎作响 [地面残留的汽油被摩擦火花点燃，微弱的火焰在车身底部蔓延，周围墙体被飞溅的碎片砸出密集的凹痕，灰尘缓缓落下，整个地下停车场回荡着金属余震的嗡鸣]，最终镜头定格在武士极具压迫感的威慑姿态，全局参数：8K 超清画质，电影级暗黑冷色调调色，极端光影对比，全布料与肌肉运动物理模拟，手持镜头模拟真实战斗的震撼感，全程动作连贯无断裂，高细节银色机械盔甲反光与白色长袍动态飘动

title: Action Game Concept Trailer Prompt for Seedance 2.0

content: Positive Prompt: Original action game concept trailer. The protagonist travels through a neon ruined city, where the debris by the road emits faulty advertising lights, and mechanical guards fall from the faults of high-rise buildings. After dodging with a slide, the protagonist pulls out a folding energy blade. The camera is like an AAA game debut trailer, with third-person follow, rapid switching between close-up and ultra-wide shots, strong rhythm and distinct scene layers. It finally stops at the silhouette of the boss's appearance, creating a strong feeling of "wanting to play this game".    Negative Restrictions: No Cyberpunk 2077 logos, no well-known game UI, no existing game character outlines. title: Cyberpunk Monitor Screen Breach POV
description: An intricate cinematic prompt for a sci-fi POV sequence where a digital character physically crosses through a monitor into the real world.
content: First-person handheld POV from a man sitting at a modern gaming desk. A large curved monitor shows a realistic pale woman with silver-white hair and a dark futuristic outfit. She notices him and reaches toward the glass. He reaches back. Their hands meet. She suddenly grabs his hand, and he pulls. The monitor surface ripples like liquid at the contact point, then tears open with a glowing screen breach. As he pulls harder, her hand and forearm emerge into the real room, transforming from digital screen image into fully physical form with realistic skin, dimensional hair, and true depth. Pixel fragments, subtle glitch particles, and glass-like shards float around the breach. She continues crossing through the monitor, shoulders beginning to emerge, while the room lighting mixes with the cool light from inside the screen. The moment feels tense, cinematic, and believable, with realistic hand interaction, shallow depth of field, and strong screen-to-reality transformation.

title: Cinematic Volcanic Dragon Rescue
description: A highly detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a fantasy rescue sequence with complex camera movements and timing instructions.
content: Ultra-cinematic fantasy action sequence in a volcanic kingdom at bright midday, with blazing sunlight cutting through ash, smoke, and heat shimmer. Start instantly with an epic ultra-wide shot of a black-stone fortress collapsing over a river of lava as a wingless knight sprints across a crumbling chain bridge while a young dragon tumbles from a broken tower. The camera rushes low and fast through sparks, falling stone, whipping chains, and bursts of flame, with dramatic scale and sharp visibility. At 7 seconds, enter slow motion as the knight leaps from the final archway, cape snapping violently, diving through fire and molten debris toward the falling dragon. At 10 seconds, snap back to full speed as the knight grabs the dragon’s neck harness, both slam onto a descending cargo lift, and crash safely into a lava tunnel as the fortress collapses behind them. End with the lift dropping into shadow while fire erupts above.

title: Ancient Drama Short Video Prompt: The Runaway Bride
description: A detailed, scene-by-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a short historical drama video titled 'The Runaway Bride.' The prompt specifies timing, camera angles (high-angle, close-up, tracking, low-angle), scene setting (general's mansion, plum blossoms), character costumes (pink Qixiong Ruqun for the female lead, dark gold dragon robe for the male lead), actions (climbing the wall, slipping, being caught), expressions, dialogue, and sound effects, structured like a professional screenplay.
content:
00:00–00:02（2s）【开场钩子 - 逃婚名场面】
- 景别：高空俯拍转近景推近
- 场景：将军府朱红高墙，墙角种满一株盛开的红梅
- 服装：
- 女主【@图1】：一身粉色交领齐胸襦裙，外罩一层薄纱杏色大袖，裙摆绣满缠枝莲纹样。发尾垂落几缕碎发，显得既隆重又凌乱。
- 男主【@图2】：玄色暗金龙纹锦袍，腰间束玉带，发丝高束，面容冷峻。
- 女主双腿跨在围墙上，身体微微前倾，紧张得鼻尖冒汗，双手死死扒着墙沿。
- 镜头微推，特写她咬着下唇，眼神既不舍又决绝，偷偷往后院墙的方向张望。
- 音效：急促的呼吸声 

00:02–00:06（4s） 
- 景别：中景跟拍 + 低角度仰拍
- 动作：
1. 女主脚下一滑，身体瞬间失去重心。
2. 她惊呼一声 “啊——！”，双手胡乱挥舞，裙摆被风吹得飞扬起来。 
- 表情：女主瞳孔地震，从慌张变成惊恐。
- 音效：风声 + 重物落地的闷响（被接住的声音）

 00:06–00:15（9s） 
- 景别：特写环绕 + 近景
- 动作：
1. 墙角下站着的的摄政王长臂一伸，精准有力地扣住女主的细腰，没有让她摔在地上。
2. 顺势将她打横抱进怀里。
3. 女主整个人撞进他坚实的胸膛，鼻尖蹭到他衣襟上冷冽的龙涎香。
- 表情：
- 女主：瞬间僵住，双手抵在他胸口，耳尖红得滴血，脸颊烫得能煮熟鸡蛋，眼神慌乱躲闪不敢看他。女主惊慌失措的说道：“你…你是谁呀？快…快放我下来! ” 
- 男主：原本冰冷的眉眼，在触到她温热的身体时，眼底瞬间柔和，嘴角勾起一抹极淡的、不易察觉的笑意。
- 台词（男主低沉磁性，带着一丝宠溺的无奈）： “我是谁?我就是你翻墙也要逃婚的摄政王。” 

- 景别：双人怼脸特写（CP感拉满）
- 动作：
1. 男主拇指轻轻摩挲着女主被他抓在掌心的手腕。
2. 微微俯身凑近，额头抵着她的额头，两人鼻尖相触，呼吸交缠。
3. 女主睫毛剧烈颤抖，长长的睫毛在眼下投出一片阴影。
- 表情：
- 女主眼神湿漉漉的，带着水汽，又气又羞，眼眶微红。眼神闪躲，双手抵住男主的胸口。
- 男主深情凝视她，眼神里满是占有欲和藏不住的温柔。

title: Cinematic Car-to-Robot Transformation
description: A detailed prompt for generating a continuous, cinematic tracking shot showing a seamless transformation of a futuristic sports car into an agile humanoid robot. The prompt specifies the environment, action choreography, camera movement, and desired visual style (Unreal Engine 5, 8k, high-octane sci-fi).
content: A continuous, cinematic tracking shot of a sleek, midnight black sports car with glowing neon cyan trim speeding down a wet, neon-lit futuristic city highway at night. Mid-drift, the car initiates a complex, seamless transformation: the hood splits, wheels rotate inward, and intricate mechanical armor panels dynamically unfold while maintaining rapid forward momentum with sparks flying. Intense cyan energy glows from within the shifting gears as the vehicle rapidly reconfigures into a sleek, agile humanoid robot. The robot completes the momentum by landing powerfully on two legs, skidding to a dramatic halt on the wet asphalt, steam rising from its mechanical joints, its glowing cyan eyes locking directly onto the camera. title: Sci-Fi Soldier Transformation VFX
description: A Seedance 2.0 prompt for a cinematic VFX shot on an Arri Alexa Mini LF, depicting a rugged soldier in a desert hangar undergoing a visceral, violent transformation into a militaristic mecha suit via a wrist-mounted trigger.
content: Cinematic VFX sci-fi transformation shot on Arri Alexa Mini LF with a low-angle steady-cam orbit. The scene features a rugged American soldier standing in a dusty desert hangar; as he activates a wrist-mounted neural trigger, heavy matte-black industrial armor plates and hydraulic pistons surge upward from his boots, encasing his body in a militaristic mecha frame. The camera circles closely as copper wires and steel framework interlock with violent precision, capturing his grimace of physical strain. The process accelerates with high-pressure steam venting from shoulder joints as a bulky chest plate slams shut. The transformation concludes with a heavy metallic resonance as a reinforced tactical helmet locks into place. The atmosphere is gritty and visceral, driven by a rhythmic crescendo of clanking metal and pressurized air, ending in a powerful, grounded stance.

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Generation Prompt for Text Effects
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video featuring dynamic text effects, focusing on the character '李岳' (Li Yue), with specific instructions for visuals, camera movement, sound effects, particle systems, lighting, material properties, and post-processing.
content:
混沌初开
 * 画面： 纯黑背景，无任何元素，只有极淡的墨色雾气在画面中心缓慢涌动，仿佛宇宙鸿蒙未判。
 * 运镜： 固定机位，镜头微微呼吸，营造压抑的张力。
 * 音效： 低沉的鼓点与丝弦颤音，频率逐渐加快。
 * 特效： 墨雾粒子从中心向外扩散，边缘呈现水墨晕染的半透明质感，粒子密度随时间递增。

笔落惊鸿
 * 画面： 一道如闪电般的白色墨痕从画面顶部破空而下，笔锋锐利如刀，带着撕裂空气的动态模糊，在画面中央骤然停顿，形成“李”字的起笔。
 * 运镜： 镜头跟随墨痕快速俯冲，在笔锋停顿瞬间轻微震颤，强化冲击力。
 * 特效： 墨痕边缘迸发出金色粒子碎屑，如星屑般向四周溅射，墨色内部蕴含流动的金色光纹，笔锋处有短暂的辉光爆发。
 * 音效： 金属撕裂声 + 重鼓点，伴随墨痕划过的尖锐风声。

逆笔成势
 * 画面： “李”字的收笔处延伸出一道蜿蜒的墨带，如灵蛇般向下盘绕，笔势由刚转柔，在画面下方骤然反转，以逆锋起笔，勾勒出“岳”字的轮廓。墨带在转折处迸发出水墨粒子，形成破碎的涟漪。
 * 运镜： 镜头环绕墨带缓慢旋转，从侧上方捕捉墨带的流动轨迹，在“岳”字起笔时快速推进，聚焦笔锋的力量感。
 * 特效： 墨带内部有金色光流涌动，转折处粒子密度倍增，形成水墨与金属质感的融合，边缘呈现半透明的辉光。
 * 音效： 丝弦急转 + 鼓点重音，墨带反转时伴随低沉的龙吟声。

 * 粒子系统： 水墨粒子（密度：0.8，大小：2-8px，寿命：1.2s，扩散速度：15px/s），金色光纹（流动速度：0.5s/圈，辉光强度：0.6）
 * 光影： 主光源为顶部金色光束（强度：0.9，色温：3200K，光束宽度：15%），辅助光为侧方冷色补光（强度：0.3，色温：6500K）
 * 材质： 墨字为哑光白 + 金属边缘（粗糙度：0.3，金属度：0.7），印章为哑光红 + 火焰边缘（粗糙度：0.5，金属度：0.4）
 * 后处理： 对比度 +20%，锐化 +15%，暗角强度：0.2，色彩分级：暗部偏冷蓝，亮部偏暖金。

title: Mutation Sequence: Confronting Inner Demons in Cyberspace
description: A detailed prompt for a 15-second artistic video exploring the concept of confronting inner demons. The prompt uses specific reference images for the protagonist, a vintage computer monitor (representing the mind/demon), and the final mutated form (Japanese Oni). It describes a dynamic sequence of attack, painful dark mutation (mechanical parts extruding, fluid facial skin melting), and ultimate victory where the protagonist reverts to their original form, all set within a dark, glitchy cyberspace environment.
content:
Create a 15s artistic, dynamic video exploring the concept of confronting and defeating inner demons.
The armored protagonist @image 1 faces a vintage computer monitor @image 2, which acts as a mirror to his mind. The emitting orange light represents the demon.

Action: The protagonist is attacked by pillars of orange light, triggering a painful, dark mutation. Mechanical parts extrude, rotate, and shift. His facial skin becomes fluid, melting away to reveal a Japanese Oni demon face beneath [Image 3]. He falls to his knees [Image 4]. Ultimately, he overpowers the demon, forcing the orange light back into the monitor and reverting to his original form.

content:

A close-up reveals his fingers gently nudging an old joystick, guiding a metallic fish through the water. Switching to his POV, electronic pulses flicker in the tank, reflecting in his curious eyes. He solemnly inserts a worn cassette labeled "DREAM" into the deck.
As the gears turn, the emerald water erupts with swirling golden particles, awakening a dormant energy. The camera pulls back to find the boy asleep against the machine, his face bathed in a gentle neon glow. The quiet cyberpunk room fades out to a soft electronic beat.

title: Doomsday: One-Shot POV Escape
description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for a continuous one-shot POV video generated by Seedance 2.0, simulating an adult male eagle's extreme-speed escape in a post-apocalyptic setting. The prompt specifies ultra-wide-angle distortion, extreme motion parallax, supersonic speed, violent camera movements (whip-pans, dives, rolls, shakes), and detailed scene elements like ruined skyscrapers, blood-gold sunset, and intense particle effects, all focused on a high-adrenaline, life-or-death escape.
content:
全程无剪辑视角，第一人杯POV，模拟一只极速逃生的成年雄鹰镜头风格。

超广角畸变镜头，画面边缘强烈拉伸，极度夸张的空间纵深感与运动视差(Motion Parallax)，电影级微距压迫感镜头以超音速级速度推进，伴随狂暴的甩摇(Whip-pans)、极限俯冲、急速滚转、翅膀扇动带来的剧烈空中颠簸与不规则震颤。

场景设定在黄昏末世，海面之上是巨大的废弃都市废墟，断裂的摩天大楼、坍塌的桥梁、锈蚀的金属钢架、破碎的玻璃幕墙、漂浮的残骸与巨浪交织。

夕阳呈血金色，低角度光线穿透厚重尘雾与浓烟，废墟在热浪与海雾中扭曲晃动，长长的阴影被无限拉长。雄鹰紧贴海面与废墟低空掠过，破碎建筑、锈蚀钢板、翻滚的巨浪、飞溅的海水在镜头前极速划过。

身后是末日灾难的追击：坠落的建筑残骸、爆炸冲击波、翻滚的火海、弥漫的浓烟与飞散的金属碎片。

巨型建筑轰然倒塌，钢筋扭曲断裂、玻璃与混凝土碎片如雨般砸落，爆炸火光冲天，火星与灰烬在空气中狂舞。镜头始终保持毫秒级极限闪避，与坠落的钢梁、爆炸冲击波、火海边缘险之又险擦身而过，气流与冲击波剧烈晃动镜头，带来极强的物理临场感。

光影为电影级质感：暖金夕阳高光、爆炸火光的强对比反射、厚重末日雾需、深邃拉长的阴影、粒子特效拉满——烟尘、灰烬、海水飞沫、金属碎屑、燃烧余烬在镜头周围疯狂旋转。

情绪基调：极致肾上腺素、生死逃亡、未日压迫感、野性求生本能。

全现场沉浸式音效：雄鹰尖锐啸叫、狂风呼味、翅膀剧烈振翅声、建筑崩塌巨响、金属撕裂声、爆炸轰鸣、海浪咆哮、冲击波撕裂空气的巨响视频在最高潮处戛然而止：雄鹰全速穿越火海与浓烟，在末日废墟的夹缝中极限逃生。

画质：8K电影质感，超写实渲。

description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 (and Kling 3.0 comparison) describing a 15-second, fast-paced battle sequence in a ruined Gothic cathedral. content: 用图片中的三个角色和场景制作一场战斗【场景设定】 哥特式大教堂废墟，石柱倾颓，暮光透过破碎彩窗，尘埃飘浮。 第0-3秒： 女战士持矛警戒前行，镜头跟随其背影推进。突然，黑龙从阴影中猛扑，利爪撕裂地面石板，碎石爆溅。女战士翻滚闪避，长矛划出弧光。镜头剧烈震颤，龙吼震荡教堂。 第4-6秒： 黑甲战士冲入，盾牌猛击龙首侧面，金属撞击骨骼的沉闷轰鸣。龙头被撞向一侧，利齿甩出唾液飞沫。快速切至女战士，她借势跃起，矛尖直刺龙颈鳞片缝隙，火花迸溅。镜头跟随矛尖冲击瞬间。 第7-9秒： 黑龙暴怒甩尾横扫，尾刃斩断石柱。柱体轰然倒塌，砸向两名战士。黑甲战士举盾硬扛，盾面凹陷，双脚在地面犁出深痕。女战士低身滑行穿过碎石雨，长矛在地面摩擦出火星。龙翼展开遮蔽光线，教堂陷入阴影。 第10-12秒： 女战士猛刺龙腹，矛身深陷。黑龙痛苦仰首咆哮,颈部膨胀,喉咙涌动红光。黑甲战士察觉危险，冲刺抱摔女战士向后翻滚。下一瞬,龙炎喷涌而出,火柱吞没两人刚才位置,石板融化成岩浆。镜头在热浪中扭曲变形。 第13-15秒： 两名战士同时发动终结。黑甲战士从侧翼盾击龙颈关节，女战士正面全力投掷长矛，矛身旋转穿透龙喉。黑龙身体僵直，重重砸落地面，震起漫天灰尘。镜头拉远定格：两名战士喘息伫立，巨龙横尸教堂中央，破碎彩窗透入的暮光照亮战场废墟。快速转黑。 ￼ 【风格说明】 • 快节奏剪辑，无慢动作 • 撞击时镜头剧烈晃动，灰尘爆裂 • 近距离特写捕捉武器与鳞甲碰撞瞬间 • 全程保持昏暗哥特氛围，火光与暮光交织 • 音效：金属碰撞、龙吼、石柱崩塌、火焰呼啸 【镜头运动】 跟随推进 → 震颤特写 → 横摇扫射 → 热浪扭曲 → 拉远定格
author: {"name":"John","link":"https://x.com/john87445528"}

title: Fantasy Romance Short Drama Script: 'Good Luck Descends'
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt structured as a short drama script for Seedance 2.0, utilizing the 'All-Reference' feature for character consistency. The script outlines a fantasy romance story where a stressed office worker (male lead) is visited by a tall, glowing 'Goddess of Luck' (female lead), transforming his mundane office into a fantastical scene of auroras and cloud seas.
content:
提示词类型：短剧分镜脚本/视频生成

画面比例：9:16 (竖屏)

画面风格：都市奇幻，由实转虚，高清晰度，影视级布光，粒子特效，治愈系。

【角色设定】

男主：身穿深蓝色西装，表情原本焦虑，身高普通，代表现实世界的“打工人”。

女主：身穿白色T恤短裤，身材极高，扎着麻花辫，全身散发着柔和的白色光晕，代表高维度的“幸运女神”。

【剧情分镜与对白】

镜头1：中景。

画面内容：男主站在灰暗的办公室里，手里拿着一堆报表，眉头紧锁，看起来压力很大。周围空气也是灰蒙蒙的。

字幕/对白：“这项目太难了，谁能来救救我...”

镜头2：特写转全景。

画面内容：一束暖光突然打在男主旁边。镜头上拉，展示女主超高的身姿。她凭空出现，仿佛是从漫画里走出来的，带着灿烂的笑容。

字幕/对白：“听说有人在许愿？”

镜头3：双人中景，身高差互动。

画面内容：男主惊讶地抬头（必须体现这种仰视的呆萌感）。女主微微弯腰，手指轻轻一点男主手中的文件。

视觉特效：指尖触碰处，金色的魔法粒子炸开。

镜头4：场景变换（奇幻时刻）。

画面内容：随着金色粒子扩散，原本沉闷的办公室背景瞬间消失，变成了绚丽的极光和云海。男主的西装变得崭新笔挺，表情从焦虑变成了惊喜。

字幕/对白：“以后，你的运气我包了。”

镜头5：近景，对视。

画面内容：两人在云海背景中对视。女主俏皮地眨眼，男主害羞地挠头。

氛围：画面充满了粉色和金色的气泡，极度唯美。

镜头6：定格结尾。

画面内容：两人并肩站立的背影，面前是璀璨的未来都市夜景。

字幕特效：大字显示《好运降临》。

title: Impossible Fantasy War Shot Video Prompt
description: A highly descriptive prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a 15-second, continuous, impossible camera move through an epic fantasy war scene, starting with a colossal dragon and diving down into a massive battlefield.
content: - 15-second impossible fantasy war shot. At golden sunset above a sea of clouds, a colossal crimson dragon circles over a mountain battlefield. The camera races toward the dragon, passes between its half-folded wings and along its spine, then dives off the edge of the mountain into the war below. It falls through clouds, projectile trails, and smoke columns, then levels out just above the battlefield, skimming across cavalry charges, shattered chariots, and exploding dust before pulling up over a river of soldiers colliding head-on. Huge scale change, impossible velocity, dragon and battlefield fully connected in one continuous move, epic fantasy realism.

title: First-person seamless rollercoaster ride through changing environments
description: A detailed, multi-part prompt for generating a seamless, first-person perspective video of a rollercoaster ride. The scene features the rider's hands gripping a safety bar and involves the coaster passing through multiple tunnels. Upon exiting each tunnel, the environment dramatically shifts to a completely different world (cyberpunk city, vast canyon, snowy mountain, abstract space), maintaining a consistent rail structure throughout. The prompt emphasizes ultra-high definition, cinematic quality, smooth motion, and realistic physics.
content:
一人称視点のジェットコースター乗車シーン。画面下部には安全バーを握る手が見えている。

完全にシームレスなワンテイク映像。カットやトランジションは一切なし。

ジェットコースターは高速でレール上を走行し、急降下、ループ、急旋回を含む。カメラは乗車者の視点として自然に揺れ、振動やモーションブラーを伴う。

コース内には複数のトンネルが存在する。

各トンネル内では、次に現れる世界の“予兆”が徐々に現れる：
・壁や天井に次の環境の要素が侵食するように出現する
・ネオンの光が漏れ出す、雪や霜が付着する、砂埃が流れ込むなど
・照明や色温度が次の世界に向かって変化していく
・空間がわずかに歪み、異なる世界が重なり始める

トンネルを抜けた瞬間、それらの予兆が一気に現実化し、周囲の風景が完全に別世界へと切り替わる。

1つ目のトンネル出口：ネオンが滲み出ていた後、サイバーパンク都市へ完全変化。光る看板と飛行体。
2つ目のトンネル出口：壁に砂やひび割れが広がり、抜けると広大な渓谷。
3つ目のトンネル出口：霜と冷気が広がり、抜けると吹雪の雪山。
4つ目のトンネル出口：幾何学的な光と色のノイズが増殖し、抜けると抽象的でシュールな空間。

各環境に応じてライティングは動的に変化。風圧、スピード感、没入感を強調。

レール構造は常に一貫しており、変化するのは周囲の環境のみ。

超高精細、シネマティック品質、滑らかな動き、リアルな物理挙動。

映像は停止せず、走行中のまま終了する。

title: Seedance 2.0 Supercar Showcase Video Prompt
description: A detailed 10-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video showcasing five different supercars, focusing on their personality and performance. The prompt specifies the car types, five distinct scenes, a progressive shot sequence (static close-up to dynamic sci-fi), detailed timing (0-2s, 2-4s, 4-10s), specific camera movements (tracking, orbiting, following), visual effects (motion blur, distortion), and sound design (Brazilian funk music).
content:
以“超跑个性与性能”为核心，10秒内串联5款特色超跑（红黑碳纤维超跑、蓝绿色光泽超跑、黄色经典兰博基尼、黄黑赛事风超跑、银色未来概念车），覆盖室内车库、明亮展厅、户外展示区、赛道、科技感室内5大场景。

从静态设计到动态行驶，全方位呈现超跑的外观质感与性能属性。

采用“静态特写→静态光效衬托→动态行驶→动态特效强化→科幻化动态”的递进式分镜。

0-2秒聚焦超跑静态细节（材质、线条）。

2-4秒用场景+光效突出视觉焦点，

4-10秒逐步强化动态感。

静态段落用“局部推近（如碳纤维纹理、车灯）+整体定格”镜头，动态段落切换为“跟拍（黄黑超跑赛道行驶）+环绕（荧光绿超跑移动）+动态跟随（概念车穿梭）”。

每2秒为一个节奏单元，0-2秒（快切静态）用0.5秒/帧的快速分镜，2-4秒（稳承光效）1秒/帧聚焦黄色兰博基尼与光效的融合，4-10秒（强动态）再次提速并通过特效增强视觉冲击。

光效贴合超跑定位，运动模糊通过“模糊程度递进”让观众感知“速度递增”，画面扭曲特效为概念车设计强化“未来穿梭”科幻感。

镜头捕捉静态时关注“进气口棱角、轮毂辐条数量”等细节，动态时捕捉“车身轻微颠簸、尾翼随速度调整、车轮与车身同步运动”。

色彩上动态段落光效色与超跑色呼应，静态段落均为“深色+亮色”搭配，多辆超跑突出“性能化细节”，场景保留“地面纹理清晰度”。搭配巴西funk音乐。

title: Viral CEO Drama: The Dragon King Reveal Prompt
description: A text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second vertical short drama in the style of a viral Chinese 'Godly CEO' revenge story. The scene involves a groom being humiliated by his future mother-in-law at a wedding, only for him to reveal his true identity as the 'Dragon King' (a powerful, hidden billionaire) in a dramatic, high-contrast sequence.
content: 【风格】国产神豪爽剧（Viral CEO Drama），竖屏构图（Portrait Mode），高饱和度滤镜，极致的面部特写，情绪大开大合。 【时长】15秒 【角色】被羞辱的新郎（穿着廉价西装，眼神隐忍不发）VS 刻薄丈母娘（满身珠宝，一脸嫌弃）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：极致羞辱（Humiliation）。 豪华婚礼现场。丈母娘当着众人的面，将一纸“退婚书”狠狠摔在男主胸口，周围宾客哄堂大笑。 【动作】丈母娘手指戳着男主的额头。 【对白口型指导】“没车没房还想娶我女儿？拿着这一百块滚出去！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：风云突变（The Turn）。 男主突然冷笑一声，撕碎退婚书。此时，巨大的螺旋桨声（音效感）盖过全场，狂风吹乱了丈母娘的发型。 【动作】男主整理了一下衣领，气场瞬间变得霸气侧漏。 【对白口型指导】“这婚，可是你们要退的。” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：神豪降临（The Reveal）。 大门被撞开，两排黑衣保镖冲进来，单膝跪地铺上红地毯。一位老管家颤抖着捧着一件黄袍（或至尊黑卡）跑到男主面前深深鞠躬。丈母娘吓得瘫坐在地上，瞳孔地震。 【对白口型指导】老管家喊：“恭迎龙王（少爷）归位！家族资产已解冻！”

title: Epic Chinese Fantasy CG Video: Four Arts of the Scholar
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-saturation, surreal CG video in the style of top-tier Chinese fantasy animation. The video depicts a character mastering the 'Four Arts' (Qin/Lute, Qi/Chess, Shu/Calligraphy, Hua/Painting) in a grand, stylized sequence set on a cloud sea, culminating in a massive ink wash painting.
content: 顶级国风动漫奇幻  CG。极高饱和度的色彩爆炸，超现实主义，瑰丽的视觉体验。 场景：苍茫浩瀚云海之巅，天地化作巨大的太极幻境。 第一镜（特写转中景）：【琴音化莲】角色凌空盘膝，抚动流光幻化的古琴，音波化作实质的金色水滴，在云海荡开层层碧水生莲的涟漪，伴随铮铮清冽的古琴音效。 第二镜（大远景广角）：【棋阵封天】琴音骤疾，角色单手食中二指凝出刺目白光棋子，重重向云海虚按。落子刹那，天穹云海齐亮，直径万丈的金色立体围棋网格瞬锁天地，黑白棋子如流星陨石砸落，引发空间扭曲，伴沉闷震心的落子回音。 第三镜（环绕运镜转特写）：【狂草镇魔】陨石雨中，角色并指为剑，以苍穹为纸，凌空快速书写狂草金文。巨大的金色古字燃起狂暴雷火，化作秩序锁链穿梭于棋阵与琴音之间，伴随雷霆轰鸣。 第四镜（俯拍极远景）：【泼墨吞世】光芒鼎盛之时，角色大袖一挥，磅礴的黑白泼墨从袖口狂涌而出，化作水墨长龙吞噬天地。琴、棋、书的能量被尽数收入墨色之中，翻涌云海最终被镇平成一幅遮天蔽日的黑白水墨画卷。角色负手立于画卷之上，衣摆狂风中纹丝不动，尽显冰冷算计与绝对力量。

0-3 秒：断崖之上乌云密布，少年剑客跪地双手握住插在岩石中的古剑，娃娃脸配圆眼，单眼皮，黑发凌乱被汗浸湿，古剑周围符文流转发出嗡鸣，镜头从俯视缓慢旋转下降。
4-7 秒：天空魔族大军压境，为首魔将手持黑色战戈，方脸配络腮胡，眼眶中燃烧绿色鬼火，挥手示意大军进攻，无数黑色箭矢如蝗虫般射向少年，镜头快速推近。
8-12 秒：少年猛然拔出古剑，金白光芒冲天而起驱散乌云，剑身上龙纹苏醒发出龙吟，少年挥剑斩出金色剑气将所有箭矢化为齑粉，镜头跟随剑气轨迹高速推进。
13-15 秒：少年踏空而起，身后浮现金色巨龙虚影，一剑斩向魔将，魔将举戈格挡却被一剑斩断兵器并从肩膀到部劈开，金色光芒笼罩整个战场，魔族大军惊恐后退，画面定格在少年持剑俯视的剪影，身后阳光刺破云层。
音效：剑身嗡鸣、龙吟震天、箭矢碎裂、魔族惊呼。
禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO 或水印。

title: Cinematic Cliff Dive and Dragon Flight Prompt
description: A high-quality action cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a woman jumping off a cliff, being caught by a dragon, and soaring into the clouds.
content:
镜头从下方疾射而上，划过嶙峋的悬崖壁，随即猛然下倾，展现出下方汹涌翻腾的大海，浪涛在黑色岩石上轰然炸裂。悬崖边缘伫立着一名女子
图片1
，她毫无畏惧，凝视着漩涡，仿佛在挑衅它卷起更高的浪涛。她毫不迟疑地迈步向前，纵身跃下悬崖，双臂张开，在呼啸的狂风和飞溅的浪花中笔直坠落。镜头伴随她一同自由坠落，当漆黑的岩石与翻腾的海水急速逼近时，她的长发与斗篷在空中狂舞。这时，一道巨大的阴影撕裂了下方的雾气——一条巨龙腾空而起，双翼如风暴之帆般舒展，鳞片在海浪飞溅中闪烁着湿润的光泽。它在女子下落途中俯冲至她身下，她以娴熟的优雅落在了它的背上，手指紧抓着它颈部的脊棱。巨龙猛地侧身，沿着螺旋弧线攀升，越过悬崖峭壁。镜头紧随其后，贴身盘旋，随后拉远镜头，最终以一个特写正面镜头定格：她骑着巨兽直冲云霄，风吹乱了她的发丝，神情却异常平静，眼中燃烧着坚定不移的决心，那汹涌的海洋此刻在遥远的下方，已显得渺小而无力。

title: Cinematic Baby Dragon and Potter in Volcanic Cave
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a scene in a volcanic cave where a human potter and a baby dragon interact, culminating in the dragon accidentally destroying the potter's work with an uncontrolled sneeze of fire. The prompt includes specific visual styles, camera movements, and scene beats.
content:
Visual Style
Photorealistic cinematic style, 16:9 aspect ratio, 8K resolution, wide dynamic range. Realistic live-action look with detailed skin, scales, clay and fire, natural highlights and shadows. Subtle handheld camera shake, shallow depth of field, filmic motion blur, warm orange key light from lava and cool blue rim light from the cave entrance.

Characters & Scene
A small, anatomically realistic baby dragon with finely detailed scales, glossy eyes and subtle muscle motion under the skin. A middle‑aged human potter in simple linen clothes, hands covered in wet clay. Location: a volcanic cave turned into a workshop; slow lava flows in distant channels, wooden shelves full of clay pots, hot air shimmering, a light layer of smoke in the air.

Action & Beats (~15 s)

[00:00–00:05] Precise glazing
Medium close shot: the potter shapes a clay vase on a heavy wooden wheel spinning smoothly. Behind him, the baby dragon carefully leans forward and releases a short, very precise stream of fire over a row of finished pots, creating a realistic glowing glaze and orange reflections on the cave walls. The camera slowly orbits around them, showing heat haze and tiny sparks in the air.

[00:05–00:08] Quiet moment
Closer shot: the baby dragon curls up on a flat rock near the wheel, eyes half‑closed, breathing calm; thin wisps of smoke drift from its nostrils. The potter smiles softly, stops the wheel, reaches out with his clay‑stained hand and offers a whole glossy red apple. Lava crackles, the only sounds are the cave ambience and the faint spin of the wheel.

[00:06–00:10] Sudden sneeze
Extreme close‑up on the dragon’s snout. It carefully sniffs the apple, dust from the rock tickles its nose, muscles tense, eyes squeeze shut. Hard cut to a wider shot: in the instant of the sneeze, the dragon releases a powerful, uncontrolled jet of flame directly onto the potter’s wheel and vase. Wood and clay instantly glow, deform and collapse into a bright molten mass; sparks and small fragments fly toward the lens.

[00:10–00:13] Aftermath
Medium shot: the potter stands frozen, face and clothes covered in a thin layer of black soot, hair slightly singed, eyes wide open. In one hand he still holds the whole, slightly charred red apple. Behind him, the wheel has become a slowly cooling, smoking puddle of molten material with a faint red glow inside. The baby dragon sits beside him, completely still, folding its wings over its face as if hiding, then carefully peeks out with a guilty expression. The camera slowly pulls back, revealing the entire cave with realistic volumetric smoke and light rays streaming in through the opening.

title: The Seed - Time and Scale Transition
description: A complex, continuous-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 that moves through time and scale in the Amazon rainforest, from a seed to orbital perspective.
content: THE SEED — Amazon Rainforest, One Tree, All Time One impossible continuous shot. Through matter. Through scale. Through time. No cuts. [0s–2s] The camera floats in the canopy of the Amazon rainforest. Dense, dripping, impossibly green. Toucans call. Monkeys move through branches. The camera drifts downward through layers of leaves — each layer a different shade of green, a different species, a different world. Light falls in shifting patterns. [2s–4s] The camera reaches the forest floor. Dark, humid, teeming. A seed sits in the black soil — a Brazil nut, mahogany-colored, the size of a fist. The camera pushes in. Closer. Closer. It passes into the soil. Darkness. Roots thread through the earth like veins. Underground, the unseen network. [4s–6s] The camera shrinks. It enters the seed itself. Inside, cellular structures — green, geometric, pulsing with water. The camera witnesses germination in time-lapse. A root breaks through the seed coat. A shoot pushes upward. Cells divide in radial symmetry. Life organizes itself. [6s–8s] The shoot breaks the surface. The camera rises with it. Time accelerates. The seedling becomes a sapling. Rain falls in fast-motion streaks. The sapling thickens — a year per second. Branches extend. The trunk widens. Bark forms, furrows, hardens. A decade of growth in two seconds. [8s–11s] The tree is adult now. Enormous. The camera pulls back as the trunk widens to 3 meters across. The canopy spreads. Animals arrive — a sloth climbs the trunk, orchids bloom on the branches, a jaguar sleeps in a crook of the roots. An entire ecosystem built around one organism. The camera rises with the tree as it reaches for the canopy. [11s–13s] The tree breaks through the canopy ceiling. Sunlight. The camera emerges from the green into open sky. For the first time, the scale of the forest is visible — an unbroken ocean of green stretching to every horizon. Rivers thread through it like silver veins. Clouds build. The tree is one cell in a body the size of a continent. [13s–15s] The camera keeps rising. The Amazon basin curves with the Earth. The planet's edge appears. Blue atmosphere against black space. The forest is a green lung on a blue world. One seed. One tree. One forest. One planet. The same thing at every scale. Cut to black. Impossible continuous shot: canopy → soil → inside seed → germination time-lapse → tree growth → canopy emergence → continental aerial → orbital perspective. Lighting transitions from dappled green forest to dark underground to cellular bioluminescence to

title: Golden Eagle Escape from Volcanic New York
description: A highly detailed prompt for a first-person POV video simulating a golden eagle's extreme-speed escape through an ancient, volcanically destroyed version of New York City. The prompt specifies ultra-wide distorted camera style, violent instability, and a sequence of chaotic evasive maneuvers through collapsing stone structures, lava impacts, and ash storms.
content:
A full, uncut first-person POV simulating an adult golden eagle escaping at extreme speed.

Camera style: ultra-wide distorted lens with intense edge stretching, an exaggerated sense of spatial depth and motion parallax, and a cinematic macro-like pressure effect. The camera surges forward at near-supersonic speed with violent whipping shakes, rapid dives, aggressive rolls, and chaotic aerial turbulence driven by powerful wing flaps.

The scene is set in an ancient version of New York during a catastrophic volcanic super-eruption. The skyline is reimagined as towering stone skyscrapers, primitive suspension bridges, and colossal monolithic structures. Volcanic ash storms rage as lava bombs rain from the sky, obliterating everything in their path.

The golden eagle dives at extreme speed through a massive stone archway resembling an ancient Manhattan gateway; flaming debris and collapsing towers explode outward as molten fragments strike. It spirals downward between towering structures, narrowly dodging falling stone slabs and fiery wreckage, skimming just above the ground before bursting through a collapsing avenue.

It then races through a grand, ancient Wall Street district, where colossal columns and statue-lined pathways shatter under volcanic shockwaves. Massive stone pillars snap and topple like dominoes, marble fragments scattering violently as the eagle performs sharp, chained evasive maneuvers between collapsing structures.

Next, it plunges vertically through a giant domed temple inspired by early New York architecture. The dome cracks under immense pressure, huge chunks crashing down as the eagle weaves through tight interior spaces and escapes through a ruptured wall.

The flight continues toward an ancient monumental complex resembling a primitive Statue of Liberty structure, now partially destroyed by lava impacts. The eagle darts through shattered frameworks and collapsing stone scaffolding, weaving in tight S-shaped paths through falling debris.

The camera remains violently unstable throughout, constantly shaken by shockwaves and turbulence. The atmosphere is dominated by a blood-orange volcanic sky, glowing lava trails streaking across the frame, and towering bursts of firelight. Ash, molten fragments, stone dust, and burning embers swirl chaotically around the camera.

Emotional tone: extreme, relentless, and adrenaline-surging, capturing a desperate high-speed escape through the destruction of an ancient New York.

title: Samurai Sword Slash and Noto Ritual
description: A highly detailed cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that describes an explosive sword draw, magenta energy effects, and a slow, deliberate sheathing sequence with calligraphic kanji appearing in the finale.
content: Extreme close-up from low angle. The torso twists away from the draw side — the left shoulder drops forward, the right shoulder pulls back, weight loading into the rear hip. Magenta energy arcs swirl around the torso, building intensity. A bright flash ignites at the sword hilt.The body uncoils — explosive rush directly toward the camera with heavy motion blur and diagonal speed streaks. The face fills the frame for one instant, eyes locked forward — then the drawn blade sweeps past in a magenta flash and the figure is already behind the camera, shrinking to a distant silhouette against the dark horizon.The sky erupts with criss-crossing sword flash lines — each slash cuts diagonally across the full width of the sky, intersecting other slashes at random angles. Each line appears as a thick bright beam — white-blue core with magenta edges — then gradually thins and fades to a thin pink trace. New lines continuously appear while older ones dissipate. The layered effect builds to peak density before slowly subsiding.The camera rushes forward to catch up. A glowing blade trail sweeps across the lens. The figure stands in noto posture — right hand raised above the left shoulder holding the sword at a diagonal, left hand at waist level guiding the blade toward the scabbard opening.The blade gleams with a bright star-burst sparkle at its midpoint. Inch by inch over several seconds, the right hand lowers — the glowing sword descends in a slow, deliberate arc toward the waiting left hand. The gleam intensifies at the point where blade meets scabbard.The instant the blade seats — a massive magenta-white explosion of light detonates from behind. Radial beams shoot outward in every direction. The figure becomes a pure silhouette against the overwhelming brightness.Within the light burst, the kanji 斬 materializes in bold calligraphic brushstrokes — dark ink against the blinding glow. Ink-splash drip effects trail from the base of each stroke. A bright horizontal magenta beam slices through the center of the kanji, and the character fragments along the cut line — upper strokes drift upward, lower strokes drift downward, as if space itself has been bisected. The magenta glow gradually dims. The fractured kanji holds its split position as the light fades to a twilight afterglow.

On screen text appears:
"The truth is still out there."

title: Epic Ink-Wash Fantasy Warrior Scene
description: A comprehensive cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a female warrior on a cliff top above a giant turtle carrying an ancient city. Includes detailed character design, lighting, and a 15-second camera timeline.
content: 主体角色： 一位年轻女性战士，黑色长发编成多股辫，发丝在风中飞扬如墨色旗帜。面容冷峻苍白，眉目深邃，嘴唇微抿，目光如刃。身穿通体暗黑色金属铠甲，铠甲表面流动着微弱的星辰光点，如同将银河碎片锻入钢铁之中。左肩披垂一面星空斗篷，深蓝与漆黑交织，其上散落无数细密的金色光尘。双手握持一柄与身等高的黑铁巨剑，剑身宽阔厚重，剑柄末端雕饰繁复的哥特式花纹，剑刃隐隐流转暗紫色的光弧。 环境场景： 东方水墨洪荒世界。一只亘古神龟缓缓从苍茫大海中升起，龟壳之上层叠着一座完整的东方巨型古城——飞檐斗拱的殿宇、密布的阁楼廊桥、倾斜的宝塔与层层叠叠的瓦屋依山势蔓延至龟背最高处。神龟四足如石柱般插入海中，足间瀑布般倾泻海水。海面弥漫着浓重的雾气，天空被铅灰色云层压得极低，偶有闪电在云缝中无声游走。神龟背上古城的最高处是一面断崖绝壁，崖顶孤立于云雾之上，崖面垂直而下，石壁上嵌满被海风侵蚀千年的古老石刻。 色彩与光线： 整体水墨青灰色调，深蓝与靛青的海面，雾白色的大气透视，铠甲上的星辰光点提供微弱的暖金色散光。闪电为冷白色，瞬间照亮时将角色剪影投射在云幕上。崖顶最后一刻，乌云裂开一线天光，苍白的日光如神谕般垂直倾泻在角色身上。 风格： 实拍电影质感，连续物理运镜，自然的镜头惯性与呼吸感，真实大气透视，水墨意境与暗黑奇幻交融，无CG痕迹，画面带有胶片颗粒与微妙的镜头畸变。 时间线： 0:00–0:03 镜头从海面以下开始，水下一片幽暗的深蓝。巨大的神龟腿部如远古石柱般矗立在浑浊的海水中，镜头沿着龟腿表面缓慢上升，苔藓、藤壶和被海水浸泡千年的石刻纹路从镜头前掠过。海水中悬浮着细小的光尘颗粒。镜头穿破海面的一瞬间，水珠附着在镜头上缓缓滑落，世界从沉默的深蓝骤然切换为风声呼啸的灰白雾海。 0:03–0:06 镜头继续向上攀升，随惯性略微摇晃。神龟背上的古城逐渐显露全貌——底层是倾颓的渔村废墟与生锈的铁链吊桥，中层是密集错落的屋舍与狭窄的石阶巷道，火光从某些窗口中隐约透出。一条巨蟒般的锁链从城中高塔垂挂而下，链环上刻满梵文般的封印符号，在风中发出低沉的金属呻吟。镜头穿过两座倾斜的塔楼之间的缝隙，碎石与瓦片从上方坠落，擦着镜头边缘掠过。 0:06–0:09 镜头以弧线运动绕至古城侧面，一只苍灰色的巨鹰从雾中无声掠出，翼展遮蔽半个画面，气流扰动使镜头轻微震颤。镜头跟随巨鹰飞行轨迹向上偏转，揭示出断崖绝壁的全貌——垂直的石壁高耸入云，崖面上凿刻着巨大的古神浮雕，面容已被风化得模糊不清，唯有空洞的双眼仍然令人不安。崖壁上有一条极窄的石阶蜿蜒而上，女战士的身影出现在石阶中段，正在攀登。她的星空斗篷在风中猛烈翻卷，巨剑斜背在身后，剑尖拖出的暗紫色光弧在雾气中留下一道短暂的残影。 0:09–0:12 镜头切换至崖顶平台的边缘，以低角度仰拍。女战士的手掌先出现在崖沿，指尖的金属护甲扣入岩石裂缝，然后她整个人翻身跃上崖顶。落地的瞬间碎石四溅，她的黑发被气流扬起如墨色火焰。她单膝跪地喘息片刻，铠甲上的星辰光点此刻明灭不定，仿佛在与她的心跳同步。她缓缓站起，面朝悬崖边缘，身前是万丈虚空——远处海平面上，更多神龟的轮廓在雾中若隐若现，组成一支沉默的远古舰队。风从深渊中涌上来，撕扯着她的斗篷和发辫。 0:12–0:15 她向前迈出最后一步，双足站在崖顶最前端的碎石之上。她缓缓将巨剑从背后拔出，剑身与背甲摩擦发出刺耳的金属嘶鸣。她双手握住剑柄，将巨剑高高举过头顶。就在此刻，头顶铅灰色云层猛然撕裂，一道苍白刺目的天光如利刃般从云缝中直劈而下，精准地照在她和剑刃之上。巨剑上的暗紫色光弧在天光激发下骤然爆发，沿剑身蔓延出无数细密的电弧与星尘碎片，如同银河在剑刃上重新凝聚。她的剪影被投射在身后翻涌的云墙上，放大成一个巨大的暗影。远处海面上的神龟群同时发出低沉的共鸣，海水开始震荡，雾气被声波推开形成同心圆。镜头缓缓后拉，画面逐渐展开为全景——孤崖之巅，一人一剑，脚下是驮载着千年古城的洪荒巨兽，身后是苍茫无尽的雾海与沉默行进的神龟舰队，天光如柱，万物俯首。

title: BRAIN DRAIN Stop-Motion Prompt
description: A detailed, narrative-driven prompt for Seedance 2, describing a hyperrealistic miniature stop-motion animation about a clay man whose brain shrinks with every question he types into a chat interface.
content: Hyperrealistic miniature diorama, stop-motion animation, handcrafted tactile materials — real fabric, clay, wire armatures, actual tiny props. A clay man sits at a miniature desk in a cozy office, a real tiny laptop open in front of him glowing with a familiar chat interface — white screen, alternating grey and white bubbles. His clay head is in cross-section — one half of his skull open like a hinged lid revealing a plump, healthy, pink clay brain filling the entire cavity. He types a question. [cut] The chat responds — a grey bubble appears. He smiles. In stop-motion the brain shrinks slightly, a tiny gap appearing between brain and skull. He doesn't notice. He types again. [cut] Rapid montage — each question fired off in quick stop-motion. With every sent message the brain shrinks one click smaller — plump to walnut to grape to pea. The empty skull space fills with real tiny cobwebs, a miniature tumbleweed rolls through, a small 'FOR RENT' sign pops up on a tiny stake inside his head. [cut] Close-up of the skull interior — the brain is now a single tiny pink crumb rattling around the bottom of an enormous empty cavity. A real tiny echo visual — the crumb bounces off the walls like a screensaver. [cut] Wide shot — the man leans back with a huge satisfied clay grin, arms behind his head, feet on the desk. The laptop screen shows hundreds of conversations in the sidebar. On the wall behind him, framed diplomas gather real dust. A real tiny spider has built a web between his ear and his shoulder. He looks completely content. The brain crumb settles in a corner and stops moving

title: Transformer Transformation Cinematic Sequence
description: A detailed, four-scene cinematic prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a complex transformation sequence of a muscle car into a giant mechanical titan, focusing on dynamic camera work, detailed mechanical actions, and an apocalyptic aesthetic. This prompt is structured with specific time stamps for each scene.
content:
分镜 1：动力重组：车尾裂变 (0-4s)
动作： Close-up tracking shot. A dusty muscle car accelerates. Suddenly, the rear chassis violently splits, expanding into gigantic hydraulic mechanical legs. The rear tires reconfigure into jagged metal heels. These legs slam onto the bridge deck, crushing the asphalt with a massive sense of weight. Blue sparks and white smoke erupt from the friction. High-frequency vibration, 8K photorealistic.

分镜 2：躯干扩张：钢铁脊梁 (4-8s)
动作：The transformation ripples forward. The car’s roof and hood fold and stack into a massive mechanical torso and armored shoulders. The interior of the car deconstructs, exposing a glowing power core. The titan stands nearly 15 meters tall, its metal spine extending and locking with a loud mechanical clank. Handheld shaky cam, low angle looking up at the growing giant.

分镜 3：正面武装：胸口炮仓 (8-12s)
动作：Extreme close-up on the chest armor plates. The heavy plating slides open in a complex clockwork sequence, revealing a colossal kinetic energy cannon nestled in the torso. Blue plasma arcs dance around the rifled barrel. The surrounding air begins to shimmer from intense thermal energy. The camera captures the intricate clicking of locking mechanisms.

分镜 4：终极裁决：毁灭一击 (12-15s)
动作：The cannon fires a devastating, blinding cyan energy beam directly from the chest. The massive recoil forces the titan to dig its metal claws into the bridge. The beam pierces through abandoned vehicles, causing them to melt and explode instantly. A shockwave ripples through the air, shattering remaining glass. Epic cinematic wide shot, masterwork, apocalyptic aesthetic.

title: Kamen Rider Transformation Sequence
description: An extremely detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a realistic, dark tokusatsu (special effects) Kamen Rider transformation sequence. The prompt specifies the aesthetic (dark, bio-mimetic armor, battle damage, wasteland setting), character details (facial features based on Image 1, gloomy expression), cinematic quality (IMAX film, Panavision lens, low-saturation blue-gray tone), and a single-shot camera rule with precise timing and action for the 'Gaze,' 'Activation,' 'Fission,' 'Growth,' and 'Completion' stages of the transformation.
content:
写实暗黑特摄 | 昆虫仿生装甲美学 | 破损装甲 | 战损变身 | 荒野废墟 

【人物与基础设定】
面部：参照图片1上传图片，五官、脸型、发型百分百还原。保留暗色痕迹，可以美化，但面部整体偏冷感。表情全程阴郁。变身瞬间表情轻微痛苦，眉心仅微皱，拒绝昂扬斗志与眼神高光，保持压抑感。
服装：参考图片1，无腰带结构。佩戴哑光金属异形装置手套。
场景：荒野废墟，微风，空气中漂浮尘埃与烟雾，阴天荒原，灰蓝色调天空。远处天空偶尔划过带火焰拖尾的陨石碎片。

【氛围与画质】 视觉基调：电影质感，模拟 IMAX 胶片摄影机，搭配 Panavision C 系列镜头（焦段 35mm，光圈 f4）。 色彩与影调：低饱和灰蓝主调。暗部信息压缩但保留细节。画面边缘轻微柔焦，叠加适度胶片颗粒。
风格核心：暗黑特摄美学，强调生物机械装甲与未知科技的融合，营造压抑、沉重、真实的变身仪式感。

【运镜规则】 单镜头：一镜到底，无剪辑。 角度：开场仰拍人物左侧，聚焦腰部以上部位。 变身时镜头以极慢速度环绕至正面平视上半身。 完成变身后环绕至人物右侧俯拍。 呼吸感：手持拍摄，全程保持极轻微的呼吸式镜头漂移。 0-3 秒 · 凝视 动作：主角疲惫站立，略微低头，目光锁定手部装置。脊背紧绷。右手缓慢伸出。 镜头：极慢向前推进，捕捉身体呼吸起伏。 特效：双眼逐渐亮起冷白光芒。眼眶周围浮现细微能量纹路。 3-6 秒 · 启动 声音：低语「DESCEND」。 动作：右手抬起，轻轻打出一个清脆响指。 特效：响指瞬间，手臂被红色火焰包裹。空气向内塌陷形成扭曲。 身体周围扩散一圈半透明能量脉冲。 脉冲呈螺旋状扩散。 头发被扰动。 0.3 秒后能量消散。 身体周围漂浮出现不规则蓝色符号结构。 镜头：低频嗡鸣由远及近。镜头产生 0.1 秒应激震动。 6-9 秒 · 裂变 核心：响指爆发出暗红色能量裂纹。 红色能量液体沿着身体结构向躯干蔓延。 身体：暗红能量雾从体内扩散。 雾中夹杂细小电弧。 风衣：由内部开始撕裂灼烧。 碎片与能量雾一同飘散。 破口边缘逐渐焦黑。 装甲：仿生装甲碎片飞散。 碎片在半空短暂停留。 随后重新组合并附着回身体。 镜头：画面因能量冲击短暂失焦。 随后迅速恢复稳定。 9-12 秒 · 生长 新物质：全新的生物机械装甲结构从体内生成。 表面带有虹彩般光泽。 像活体结构般缓慢蠕动延展。 肩甲：新生肩甲对撞。 爆发暗红色火星。 留下能量刻痕。 胸甲：胸甲随心跳缓慢开合。 甲缝中闪烁微弱光芒。 衣物：原有外套被能量场从身体抽离飞出画面。 面部覆盖：粉白色薄膜从面部蔓延。 逐渐拼接成面具轮廓。 覆盖速率不一。 形成不对称结构。 复眼：多晶光学复眼逐渐亮起。 左眼比右眼快 0.5 秒完成。 部分单元闪烁。 亮度不均。 视线：整个变身过程中主角始终直视前方。 12-15 秒 · 完成 头盔：两只复眼完全组合。 整个面部被面具覆盖。 头盔顶部生长出冠状结构。 角部燃起蓝色能量火焰。 复眼持续发光。 部分单元仍有轻微闪烁。 肩甲：边缘翘起。 鳞片纹路明显。 缝隙中渗出微弱能量光液。 腰侧：一道巨大装甲裂隙尚未闭合。 暗红流光在其中流动。 随呼吸轻微起伏。 战衣：战衣呈纯白配色。 造型浮夸。 整体类似甲虫仿生机甲。 腰部、复眼与裂隙持续发光。 全身偶尔闪过细小电弧。 战衣表面布满战损痕迹。 最终镜头 镜头环绕至人物右侧。 机位变为俯拍。 镜头极慢向后拉远。 人物逐渐进入准备战斗姿态。 展示人物与环境信息。 结尾 风声。 无台词。 无爆炸。 无光芒万丈。 只有站立的人。 和不完整的装甲。 远处天空划过一颗陨石。 镜头定住。
