title: Bus transforming into a Cybertronian mechanical giant caterpillar
description: An extremely detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing the aggressive transformation of an old American-style bus into a grumpy, evil Cybertronian mechanical giant caterpillar, including specific details about the mechanical components, the driver's reaction, camera movement, and desired visual style.
content: an old, green, oversized, and extra-tall American-style bus is parked in a dilapidated parking lot in a forest. A young Asian driver slams on the brakes, looking tense and speechless. The bus begins to violently disassemble and reorganize from the inside out, transforming into a grumpy, evil Cybertronian mechanical giant caterpillar. The driver's cabin reassembles into a mechanical head, the windshield becomes its glasses, and the bumper turns into a chin. Both sides of the mouth use hydraulic devices, the tongue is made of seats, and the teeth are formed from broken orange handrails inside the bus. The headlights transform into its eyes, and the entire body is composed of large vehicle components in segments. It spits the driver out of its mouth, bites his head, and tosses him into the air to land on its back; the driver grabs the handrails on the back to stand firm. The mechanical giant caterpillar strikes a cool pose, roaring and spitting sparks. The windows and tires remain intact. The transformation process is aggressive, with the body constantly twisting and crawling, parts rubbing and sparking, dust flying, and valves venting air. The camera moves continuously from the cabin to the exterior, showing the mechanical body's massive yet slender stature. Use a realistic visual style for the generated material, employing a humorous yet terrifying transformation style, accompanied by intense and shocking background music.

title: Anubis Tickle Torture Animation
description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt for a 3D animation sequence where the mighty Anubis is captured and subjected to tickle torture by villains demanding his secrets, resulting in muffled giggles and loud laughter.
content:
Traditional modern 3D animation style: 

0.0s-4s: 
Mighty Anubis sits in his throne and a group of villains stand in front of him with a mecha robot. The mecha robot is currently holding Anubis arms above his head. The group of villains demand Anubis to reveal the secrets of his powers and Anubis nonchalantly and bored says that he won’t tell these mortals anything. 

4.1s-6s: 
1 of the villains pushes a button on a remote control with a grin and 2 additional mechanical arms emerge from the mecha robot with white gloved hands towards Anubis’s armpits. Anubis watches as they approach his armpits with confusion. 

6.1s-7.5s: 
Closeup view of one glove tickling Anubis’s exposed armpit with gentle finger wriggling going „Kocho Kocho“. 

7.6s-10s: 
Anubis’s expression immediately changes into a wide grin in goofy fashion and letting out muffles giggles in his deep voice because he is very ticklish. The gloves continue tickling Anubis’s armpits and Anubis continues his muffled giggling while trying to move his upperbody but his arms remain secured above his head and the gloves keep tickling his armpits. The villains demand again that Anubis reveals his secrets. 

10.1s-13s: 
Anubis now laughs loudly in his deep voice while the gloves continue tickling his armpits but Anubis through his laughter says that he wont tell them anything.

title: Elemental Chaos Battle on a Coastal Battlefield
description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 (used via Dreamina) describing a massive coastal battle between three colossal creatures: a sky dragon, a fire colossus, and an ocean leviathan. The prompt specifies the opening frame, simultaneous attacks, elemental chaos, environmental destruction, camera sweeps, color logic, and a final catastrophic collision.
content:
A massive coastal battlefield where ocean, land, and sky collide. Three colossal creatures engage:
— a sky dragon with metallic scales and storm wings
— a fire colossus emerging from volcanic fissures
— a giant ocean leviathan rising from the sea
Opening frame: wide shot of coastline — ocean churning, volcano erupting, storm clouds gathering overhead.
Hook at second two: all three creatures attack simultaneously.
The battlefield fractures into elemental chaos:
— the dragon generates hurricane-force winds and lightning
— the fire colossus erupts lava and shockwaves
— the leviathan summons massive tidal surges
The city between them collapses under combined forces — water floods streets, fire ignites structures, wind tears apart buildings.
Camera sweeps between the three titans, snap zooming into collisions — fire meeting water in explosive steam clouds, lightning striking molten terrain.
Color logic: deep ocean blue, molten orange-red, storm gray and electric white.
Escalation builds as all three forces collide at the same point, destabilizing the entire coastline.
Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the wave-fire-storm collision itself, rushing forward as all elements merge into a single catastrophic blast.
Massive environmental destruction, multi-element physics interaction, cinematic scale, 4K ultra-detail.

title: Sci-Fi Transformation Scene
description: A detailed, single-take 15-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a man in a wasteland undergoing a violent, glowing transformation into an armored, horned figure with electrical arcs and a miniature black hole effect.
content:
65mm IMAX, ultra-wide anamorphic lens, heavy film grain, strong lens flares. Eclipse-like atmosphere with dense gray fog. Only light source is an internal orange-red glow from the character, like a dying star.
Single-take 15s:
A dust-covered man stands alone in a wasteland. Handheld camera circles him in a 360° orbit with slight shake from heat. He slowly raises his hand—fingertips turn semi-transparent, air distorts.
His body convulses under pressure. Glowing golden cracks spread beneath his skin, bones crack. Purple-black smoke with blue electrical arcs bursts from his spine. Deep fractures leak liquid gold.
Floating metal debris is pulled toward him. Rusted black armor plates slam into his body with sparks, forming uneven armor—cracked shoulders and a chest plate revealing a molten core.
Red metal spreads across his face, forming a mask. His eyes collapse, then ignite with blue electric light, one flickering. Two large black horns emerge with faint purple flames.
Final: he raises his hand, forming a blue flame like a miniature black hole. He slams the ground—spiraling gravity shockwave destroys nearby ruins. Silence. Broken black wings extend. He lifts his head, blue eyes glowing through the fog.

title: Political Satire Short Film: The 'Nothing' Hero's Ride
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0, structured as a short film script with dialogue and camera instructions, depicting a satirical narrative. A confident figure on horseback rides through a wealthy neighborhood, expecting a warm welcome, only to be completely ignored by a crowd rushing past him to a Chinese steamed bun shop, leading to a moment of self-mockery and a defiant ending.
content:
场景1：骑马狂奔 + 热情人群迎面而来（0:00-0:08，8秒）
• 地点：温哥华豪宅区主弯曲道路（宽阔柏油路，两侧大型独立豪宅、常绿松树覆盖薄雪）
• 主体：身穿深色西装的骑马者策马全速奔驰，白马四蹄腾空、鬃毛飞扬
• 环境：轻雪飘落，豪宅建筑掠过，远处北岸山脉与海洋轮廓
• 人群：前方突然出现一大群热情支持者（多元族裔年轻人），挥舞黄色龙旗 + “Nothing”标牌，高喊欢呼，朝骑马者方向涌来
• 镜头：正面中速跟拍 → 切换到骑马者视角（POV），人群越来越近
• 氛围：高潮延续，骑马者满脸自信笑容，准备收缰（手已抬向缰绳，姿态放松，嘴角上扬）
场景2：反转——人群直接穿过，无视骑马者（0:08-0:14，6秒）
• 地点：同一道路，转角处出现一家中式包子铺（招牌“庆风包子铺”，温暖灯光，外摆区域有简易塑料桌椅，蒸汽升腾）
• 主体：骑马者正准备招手致意，结果人群对他视若无睹，直接从他两侧/身旁狂奔穿过，冲向包子铺门口排队/涌入
• 动作：骑马者笑容僵住，手停在半空，表情从期待转为错愕/凌乱（风吹乱头发，西装下摆晃动）
• 细节：人群高喊“包子！包子！”，黄色龙旗乱晃，“Nothing”标牌被挤到一边；白马被迫小步停顿或侧身避让
• 镜头：快速横摇/广角，展现人群如潮水般绕过骑马者（马匹在画面中央被“穿过”），骑马者孤零零留在中间
• 氛围：荒诞反转，尴尬凌乱，黑色幽默高潮
场景3：包子铺外吃包子对话（0:14-0:20，6秒）
• 地点：庆风包子铺外摆区域（塑料桌椅，热气腾腾的蒸笼，背景豪宅区道路）
• 主体：两个普通年轻人（穿羽绒服）坐在排队座位上，大口吃包子
• 动作：一人咬一口包子，满足闭眼“哎，真香。”（镜头特写包子咬开热气/汁水）
• 对话：

第一个人（边吃边望向道路）：他是谁啊？
第二个人（若有所思，嚼着包子，望着远处）：Nothing。
• 镜头：中景双人镜头 → 轻微推近脸部表情（满足+淡定），背景隐约可见骑马者远去的背影
• 氛围：接地气、反差萌，点题“nothing”

场景4：骑马者自嘲潇洒，继续远去（0:20-0:30，10秒）
• 地点：豪宅区宽阔延伸道路（笔直向前，豪宅群渐远）
• 主体：骑马者骑在马上，表情从凌乱转为自信一笑
• 动作：右手伸入西装胸兜，掏出一个包装三明治，狠狠咬一口（汁水/面包屑飞溅），然后潇洒甩头一笑，用缰绳轻抽白马，继续向前奔跑
• 环境：豪宅建筑群在背景逐渐缩小，道路两侧常绿树林与支持者（现在已停下）只能远望挥手，远处温哥华式山海天际线（雪雾朦胧）
• 细节：白马尾巴摆动，轻雪路面留下马蹄印，三明治咬痕清晰，骑马者嘴角带笑，自信满满
• 镜头：从近景（咬三明治特写） → 缓慢拉远成极远景，低角度拍摄，强化“无所谓”的孤高英雄感；最后淡出
• 氛围：自嘲却潇洒，英雄不羁，象征性结束（“Nothing”也能继续前行）

title: Warrior Woman Riding a Dragon Cinematic Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a warrior woman leaping off a cliff into a maelstrom, being caught mid-air by a massive dragon, and then riding the dragon skyward. The prompt specifies camera movements (rocket up, whip into downward tilt, freefall, spiraling arc) and emotional tone (fearless, determined).
content:
The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. 

She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. 

Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. 

The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.

title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for Cosmic Planetary Instability
description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0, focusing on generating a video sequence depicting a colossal celestial entity causing planetary temporal instability, with rapid day/night cycles, surging oceans, and violent atmospheric patterns.
content:
A colossal celestial entity formed from rotating rings of mechanical galaxies appears above Earth’s atmosphere, its body made of spinning orbital mechanisms and luminous time-structures — hook at second two: one massive hand rotates a cosmic mechanism embedded in its chest.

The planet’s rotation stutters.

Day and night begin switching rapidly.

The transformation unfolds as planetary temporal instability: oceans surge as tides accelerate, satellites fall from orbit as gravity fields shift with the altered rotation, and entire cities experience simultaneous sunrise and darkness.

Cloud systems spiral violently as atmospheric patterns accelerate.

The entity continues turning the mechanism.

Time begins moving unevenly across continents.

The aftermath unfolds across planetary systems collapsing under temporal distortion.

Electrical storms encircle the planet in rapid succession.

The entity floats beyond the atmosphere, observing the temporal engine stabilize.

Diegetic cosmic light from rotating galactic rings illuminates the planet’s surface, cinematic planetary time-distortion effects, volumetric cloud and ocean motion, 4K.

title: Large-Scale Architectural Transformation and Destruction Physics Video Prompt
description: A complex Seedance 2.0 prompt focused on simulating advanced physics, destruction, and large-scale architectural transformation. The scene features a figure with a glowing mantle causing the urban landscape to reconfigure and dissolve into a vast, circular void, emphasizing realistic mass and coherence in the debris and structural changes.
content: A majestic presence in a dark, flowing mantle stands amidst a vibrant city square, its coat woven with shimmering violet lines that trace hidden patterns — as it lifts a hand, the lines burst into radiant light. A subtle shift forms beneath the surface. The square gently slopes downward. The scene evolves: cars glide toward the shift, water features swirl into aerial rings, and nearby structures adjust their stance as their foundations realign. Ripples of change spread outward through the urban landscape. Lamp posts lean in, as if drawn to a central force. The figure moves through a neighborhood transforming into a wondrous space: ground level shifts → mid-rise buildings realign → rooftop structures begin to reconfigure. Glass and steel stretch and curve like pliable material. A dynamic view circles the forming anomaly, with fragments swirling in tighter orbits. The scene reaches a peak, and a structure's form dissolves. From above, the city features a vast, circular void where space has been reimagined. The figure stands serenely at its center. Violet light dances with orbiting fragments and warped architecture.

title: Tentacle Family Breakfast Animation Test
description: A user tested CapCut's Seedance 2.0 by providing three character images and a detailed two-part prompt to generate a 15-second animation about a family with tentacles having breakfast, where the parents have drastically changed appearances.
content:
Morning. Kitchen. （Character 1） skillfully manipulates a frying pan with multiple tentacles, cooking pancakes. Beside him, （Character 2 ）holds a teapot with a suction-cup tentacle, brewing fragrant coffee. All the kitchen utensils have transformed into organic shapes, and iridescent steam rises from them. （Character 3 ）mutters, "Mom and Dad, you look weird," and stands frozen in the entryway, gazing at his drastically changed parents.

Morning. Kitchen. （Characters 1 and 2 ）notice （Character 3） and gently wave their tentacles, beckoning him. They look like aliens, but their eyes still hold the same deep affection. （Character 1）: "Good morning. Would you like some of our special pancakes?" （Character 2）: "There's a dance party in the square today. Let's hurry and go together." （Character 3） smiles in surprise, relieved by his parents' warmth, and thinks, "They may look different, but Mom and Dad are still the same!"

title: Seedance 2.0 Transform Prompt Framework
description: A detailed, multi-shot Japanese prompt framework for Seedance 2.0, designed to create a stable 'transform' sequence where a character is built from silver liquid metal into a human-looking figure with mechanical elements, culminating in a final appearance and dialogue. This framework is shared after extensive testing to reproduce common transformation videos.
content:
参考画像の人物をキャラクタープロトタイプとして使用する。

SHOT 1 — 銀色液体金属（0–3秒）
固定俯瞰、完全静止。
円形金属プラットフォーム中央で、鏡面の銀色液体金属が冷白色ライトを反射しながら流動。微振動後、磁場に引かれるように中央へ収束し、女性シルエットへ立体形成。
液体はチタン合金構造へ分離。
脊柱が下から順にロック、肋骨展開、骨盤閉合。
四肢関節が回転固定、内部油圧が作動。
液体が内側へ凝固し、ブラッシュド加工の機械骨格が露出。
クールブルーのリムライト。指先が微動。
冷色・高コントラストの実験室空間。

SHOT 2 — 皮膚形成（3–7秒）
正面ミディアム固定。
ロボットアームが透明モールドを下降。
高分子バイオ皮膚が薄膜のように密着。ナノファイバー融合、筋肉が微収縮テスト。
マクロ：毛穴生成、肌テクスチャ形成。
首は一部透明構造を維持、内部に緑色発光ライン。
肌色が自然な人肌へ変化。
SHOT 3 — 顔・猫耳（7–9秒）
クローズアップ、ゆっくり前進。
閉眼。虹彩は淡いブルーグレー。
バイオ猫耳展開。黒白ツートンの長髪生成、自然落下。
顔に微細な機械紋様を残す。
ゆっくり開眼。冷静でやや憂いのある視線。

SHOT 4 — メイク（9–10秒）
マクロ。
頬をブラシで整え、唇色調整。
黒白対称ヘアを仕上げ。
自然な皮膚反射とSSS表現。
SHOT 5 — 着装（10–12秒）
全身ミディアム。
グリーンの未来制服が自動装着。
肩と袖口が発光。
首の透明機構が柔らかな緑光。布地質感明瞭。
SHOT 6 — 登場・台詞（12–15秒）
ワイド映画画角。
実験室の扉が開く。逆光リムライト。
一歩前進、軽く首を傾け、カメラに正確にフォーカス。
自然な微笑。

やさしく落ち着いた声で：
「Hi, my master.」
自然なリップシンク。
0.5秒アイコンタクト維持。
4K HDR、シネマティックライティング。

A cozy children's picture book lies open on a wooden table, showing a detailed illustration of a glass mason jar filled with glowing cartoon fireflies, a metal lid on top. A realistic human hand enters from the right, fingers gripping the edge of the illustrated lid as if about to twist it open. Close-up shot, dim warm evening atmosphere, magical golden glow, photorealistic style, 4K.

Image-to-Video Prompt:
The hand twists and lifts the lid off the page. Dozens of tiny three-dimensional glowing fireflies burst upward from the illustrated jar, drifting and blinking with warm golden light above the open book. Their glow reflects softly onto the surrounding pages as they scatter slowly into the air. Camera pulls back gently to capture the full swarm, smooth motion, 6 seconds.

title: Seedance 2.0 One-Shot Cinematic Camera Movement Prompt
description: A highly detailed, long-form prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a single, continuous, complex camera shot (one-shot) through a massive Oriental fantasy city of gods and Buddhas, culminating in a close-up of a master martial artist. The prompt specifies camera movements, scene elements, character details, and cinematic quality.
content:
一镜到底镜头提示词：神佛之城·宗师登台】
镜头以一镜到底的方式，在巨型东方奇幻神都中俯仰、翻滚、旋转、飞驰。
【起始帧 - 图1场景】：镜头从天空俯冲而下，掠过悬浮的巨大苍白月球，快速接近两尊耸立云端的巨型佛像立掌雕塑（高度超过百米），穿过佛像指缝间缭绕的薄雾与红色灯笼串。镜头急速下降，俯瞰脚下青绿色运河纵横的东方奇幻水上都城，密集的木质古建筑、吊脚楼、石桥、灯火通明的船坞在雾气中若隐若现。
镜头穿过佛像掌心的雕花装饰，沿着盘绕佛像基座的螺旋木质栈道急速下坠，闪避悬挂的红灯笼、飘扬的经幡、朝拜的僧侣与香火烟雾。镜头俯冲掠过运河水面，激起水花，穿过一艘悬挂红灯的乌篷船顶，滑入水下。
水下镜头轻盈穿过透明的玻璃观景廊道，看到两侧深邃的水底古城废墟、沉没的石柱与浮游的锦鲤。镜头向上突破水面，冲出中心祭祀广场的喷泉，水珠四溅。
镜头在半空翻转，横扫过广场上整齐列队的数百名黑衣武者（如图2所示），他们双手抱拳、静默肃立，形成人墙。镜头穿过武者之间的缝隙，贴地滑行，掠过刻有云雷纹的巨型石质祭坛台阶。
【过渡段】：镜头沿着台阶螺旋上升，闪避两侧燃烧的巨型青铜香炉、摇曳的火光与飘散的香烟。镜头急速旋转360度，展现背景中两尊巨佛雕像、悬浮的苍白月球、雾气弥漫的天际线。
【结束帧 - 图2场景】：镜头最终稳定在祭坛顶端平台，正对着一位身穿白色长袍、腰束米色腰带、肩披黑色机械护甲的中年东方武者（参考图3角色）。他双手自然垂于身侧，手持两柄交叉的银色机械长刀，面带淡然微笑，站在台阶尽头的中心位置。
镜头缓缓后拉，展现他身后两尊巨型佛像立掌雕塑、下方密密麻麻的黑衣武者方阵、以及远处雾气中的水上古城全景。天空苍白月球巨大悬挂，薄雾缭绕，氛围庄严肃穆、史诗感十足。
无剪辑、不可思议的镜头运动、无缝衔接，充满东方神秘、史诗宏大、极具电影感。8K高清画质，高品质影像素材。

title: Detailed Multi-Shot Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0, ViduQ3, and Kling 3.0 Comparison
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for video generation models (Seedance 2.0, ViduQ3, and Kling 3.0) to compare their performance. The prompt specifies the style as Japanese full-color 2D cel animation with 8K resolution, cinematic lighting, and a cyberpunk atmosphere. It outlines a three-shot sequence featuring a female dominator character with silver hair and a white suit, sitting on a throne against a wall of surveillance cameras, including specific camera movements, actions (like snapping fingers), and dialogue for each shot.
content:
【動画のスタイル】
日本のフルカラー２Dセルアニメ, 8K解像度, マルチカット構成, 映画的ライティング, エピックでサイバーパンクな雰囲気, シネマティックなカメラワーク, 心理的プレッシャー

【キャラクター・舞台詳細】
女性（支配者）: 銀色の長髪, パッツン前髪, メカニカルな髪飾り, 白いスーツ, ハイヒール。無数の監視カメラの壁を背にした玉座に座る。
舞台: 壁一面を埋め尽くす大量のセキュリティカメラ群の部屋。

[0s - 3s] ショット1：静かな支配
カメラ: 初期フレームからスタート。玉座の女性の全身から徐々にバストアップへのシネマティックなズームイン。
アクション: 銀髪の女性は組んだ脚をわずかに揺らしながら、余裕のある冷徹な微笑みを浮かべる。
セリフ: 日本語で「はは！ いまさら気づいたの？おろかだねぇ」

[3s - 5s] ショット2：ギミックの発動
カメラ: 女性の胸元から顔周辺へのクロースアップへ。
アクション: 女性がゆっくりと右手を上げ、顔の横で「パチン」と指を鳴らす（スナップ動作）。
セリフ: 日本語で「ふふふ……」

[5s - 8s] ショット3：覚醒と宣告
カメラ: 背景の監視カメラ群へ急速にダイナミックなズームアウト。
アクション: 指を鳴らした瞬間、壁一面のすべての監視カメラのレンズが一斉に「赤い光」を放ち、強烈なレッドの逆光となって女性を照らし出す。女性は圧倒的な支配感のある魅惑的な笑顔をカメラ（視聴者）に向ける。
セリフ: 日本語で「ぜんぶ……お見通し♡」

title: Apocalyptic Naval Disaster Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic disaster movie scene featuring the catastrophic structural failure of a supercarrier in a massive North Atlantic storm, emphasizing violent realism and specific camera movements.
content: {"lang":"zh","prompt":"风格与氛围：末日级海军覆灭，以低饱和钢蓝与炮铜灰为主色调，爆炸琥珀与航空燃油烈焰刺破灰域。压顶风暴层积雷暴云内部被闪电照亮。雨线切割所有表面。长焦压缩将毁灭层层叠加。实拍质感暴力美学——无干净CG光泽，只有砂砾、重量与质量。动态描述：航拍无人机极远景后拉——一艘超级航母在滔天巨浪中向左舷灾难性倾斜，飞行甲板倾角超过四十五度，海水以白浪薄膜状态漫灌甲板表面。三架战斗机同时挣脱系留链锁，沿湿滑钢板横向滑移，起落架刮擦金属迸射火花串，第一架战机翻越甲板边缘坠入翻搅灰色海面。硬切至水面高度手持中景仰望——航母船体如崩塌摩天楼般耸立头顶，藤壶覆盖的钢板呻吟弯曲，铆钉如连发枪响般依次弹射，结构性裂缝从舰体中段劈开，可见冲击波沿金属表皮涟漪扩散。海水从扩张裂口倾泻灌入。切至稳定环绕广角跟拍——航母在断裂点一分为二，舰艏向前俯冲扎入巨型涌浪，舰艉翘向天空暴露出仍在空气中旋转的螺旋桨组，数吨海水从抬升舰艉倾泻而下形成瀑布群。航空燃油在海面点燃——火焰以扩张环形在水面蔓延，黑色烟柱扭曲上升钻入风暴。一道二十米高异常巨浪从画面左侧涌入，正面撞击倾斜舰艏，白色浪花爆炸至六十米高空，将整个前部结构吞没。静态描述：尼米兹级超级航母灾难性结构失效。北大西洋风暴海况——十五米涌浪、水平暴雨、六十节狂风将浪尖吹成水雾。雷暴云底三百米并伴有内部闪电照明。飞行甲板散落脱锁战机、断裂系留链、漫灌海水。舰体中段断裂暴露内部甲板层。航空燃油在海面燃烧。异常巨浪从左舷逼近。"}

title: Zero-G Astronaut Run on Damaged Orbital Station
description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a cinematic sequence of a female astronaut sprinting across a damaged orbital station, jumping toward a cargo module as solar panels break apart, and sealing herself inside just before debris hits.
content:
A female astronaut in a white EVA suit sprints across the outer ring of a damaged orbital station above Earth.

The station slowly rotates while massive solar panels break apart and drift into space.

At the 2-second mark she jumps from the rotating ring toward a drifting cargo module.

Camera floats beside her as Earth spins in the background.

She grabs a handle, swings through the airlock hatch, and seals the door just as debris slams into the station behind her.

Orbital debris field, zero-gravity leap, rotating space station exterior run, cinematic space lighting, 4K.

title: High in the rugged 1975 Ladakh mountains, Indian engineers harness newly discovered anti-gravity minerals nicknamed “Shakti Stones.”
description: A detailed narrative prompt for a cinematic scene set in the 1975 Ladakh mountains, focusing on Indian engineers using newly discovered anti-gravity minerals to construct floating vessels that fuse Himalayan architecture with advanced levitation technology. The scene includes pilgrims, UFO spotters, quantum physicists, and a line of silent monks, blending spiritual and mechanical anticipation.
content:
High in the rugged 1975 Ladakh mountains, Indian engineers harness newly discovered anti-gravity minerals nicknamed “Shakti Stones.” 

In hidden shipyards, they construct floating vessels that fuse Himalayan architectural design with advanced levitation. 

Pilgrims from the plains, UFO spotters, and quantum physicists come, each with a motive: from spiritual journeys to militaristic power. 

A line of monks watches in silent contemplation. Ethereal chanting merges with whirring mechanical noises, building anticipation.

title: Original Ocean Fantasy Fashion Short Film Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, artistic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an original fashion short film with an ocean fantasy theme, focusing on pure visual expression, slow motion, specific color palettes (cool blue, soft purple, pale gold), and the movement of a custom-designed dress.
content:
原创海洋幻想时尚短片，纯艺术化视觉表达，唯美、安静、梦幻、高级。场景为抽象化海洋灵感空间，深色背景干净纯粹，画面中的光线仅来自服装纹理与少量海洋发光粒子，整体柔和克制。主色调为冷青、柔紫、淡金，发光效果细腻轻盈，强调未来感与时尚大片质感。

一位高挑原创时尚角色身着原创长裙，缓慢行进在平缓开阔的海洋灵感场景中。服装由轻薄层叠材质构成，表面带有柔和流动的发光纹理，随着动作自然变化。裙摆与飘带在流动环境中轻轻展开，周围漂浮少量荧光粒子与小型发光鱼群，画面纯净，节奏舒缓。

镜头从稳定远景缓慢推进，展现角色与场景的整体层次；再切换到近景侧面跟拍，突出服装材质、发光线条、流动纹理与细腻反光；随后俯拍镜头缓缓下降，角色停下动作，双臂自然舒展，礼裙外层结构逐渐打开，形成如海洋花朵般的优雅轮廓。结尾中，角色进入轻盈漂浮状态，服装完整舒展，周围少量发光粒子、水母形光影与柔和鱼群缓慢环绕，画面定格在唯美、纯净、超现实的海洋时尚瞬间。

关键词：原创角色，原创服装，海洋幻想，艺术时尚，唯美慢镜头，发光纹理，轻盈漂浮，纯视觉叙事，安全中性表达。

title: One Piece Inspired Video Prompt: Loki Saves Hostages
description: A detailed, narrative prompt inspired by One Piece chapter 1174, describing a dramatic scene where child hostages are about to fall into the sea, only to be saved by Loki, who transforms into a giant black dragon. The scene culminates with Loki, Gear 5 Luffy, and Ragnir (in squirrel form) preparing for battle against MMA monsters.
content:
人質の子供たちは歩くのを止められず、着実に港の端と、船の破壊によって海の雲に開いた穴へと近づいていく。
ソマーズは「死んでも構わない、後でまた別の巨人族の子供たちを攫えばいい」と言う。  リプリーと子供たちの家族たちは必死に止めようとするが、止められないと悟り、子供たちを抱きしめる――そして全員が落ちる。  だが……！！！
ロキが現れ、彼らを救う。
彼は巨大な黒い龍に変身し、空から全員を掴み取る（この章ではロキの悪魔の実の名前は明かされていない）。  章の最後は、龍形態のロキ、ギア5のルフィ、そしてリス形態のラグニールがロキの頭の上に乗り、
MMAモンスターたちへ攻撃を仕掛ける準備が整った姿で締めくくられる。

description: A prompt for creating an opening title sequence animation for the phrase '哥飞出海' (Ge Fei Chu Hai) in a mystical/fantasy style. 混沌初开，剑意潜涌，画面从绝对纯黑开始，无任何光源。随着低沉的弦乐与金属颤音响起，画面中心开始浮现极淡的青白色粒子流，如深海暗流般缓慢汇聚，形成 一道若有若无的竖形光带，光带边缘伴随细碎的墨色飞溅特效， 粒子密度逐渐提升，营造出“山雨欲来”的压迫感。剑势破局，笔意初现粒子流突然加速， 从竖形光带中爆发出一道贯穿画面的凌厉白光，如剑刃破空，瞬间撕裂黑暗。字的白光所过之处，文字以水墨泼洒的方式快速成型，笔画边缘带有锋利的锯齿状光效， 墨色由深黑渐变为青蓝，笔画内部流动着细碎的剑刃反光粒子，整体呈现出“剑刃劈山” 的动态张力。
